With years of clinical experience in the UAE, Dr. Alanoud has become well versed in both preventive and restorative dentistry. Her expertise includes restorative procedures like fillings, crowns, and bridges. She also specializes in endodontic treatments, including [root canal therapy](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/articles/root-canal-treatment/). Dr. Alanoud also excels in cosmetic dentistry, providing services like veneers and [teeth whitening](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/articles/teeth-whitening/). These treatments help patients achieve their desired smile while promoting long term oral health.

Dr. Alanoud takes pride in offering pain management and patient care, ensuring a comfortable and stress free experience for every patient. She is passionate about oral hygiene education, empowering patients with the knowledge to maintain optimal dental health at home.

At HealthHub Clinic, Dr. Alanoud’s focus is always on personalized care. She listens to her patients’ needs and educates them about their dental health. Dr. Alanoud works closely with each patient to create a customized treatment plan. Whether you need a routine check up, tooth extractions, or advanced procedures, her compassionate, patient centered approach ensures the highest quality care.

doctors.name: Prof. Dr. Ahmed Almousa
doctors.title: Consultant Orthopedic Surgeon
doctors.about:
Prof. Dr. Ahmed Almousa, Consultant Orthopedic Surgeon, is a German Board-certified Orthopaedic and Trauma Specialist with more than 16 years of international experience. He currently practices in Dubai, UAE. Dr. Ahmed Almousa is known for expert care in joint replacement, sports injuries, and trauma surgery. He also specializes in minimally invasive orthopedic procedures. He combines deep clinical knowledge with compassionate patient care. Dr. Ahmed earned his medical specialty degree from the Academic Hospital of Bonn University in Siegen, Germany.

Later, he enhanced his skills with a fellowship in knee surgeries and sports traumatology at Sportklinik Hellersen in Lüdenscheid, Germany. There, he served as a consultant (Oberarzt). This hospital ranks among Germany’s top institutions for orthopedics and sports medicine and has earned multiple awards.

Throughout his career, Dr. Ahmed Almousa has held leadership roles at leading hospitals in Germany and the UAE. Additionally, he served as a visiting Professor at Xian Medical College in China & visiting Professor at Shaanxi Provincial Peoples Hospital (“Shaanxi”) in China. These positions allowed him to influence healthcare standards and shape future specialists. Moreover, he actively participates in teaching and training programs worldwide, sharing his expertise with medical students and professionals alike.

In addition to his clinical work, Prof. Dr. Ahmed Almousa is a respected innovator and educator. He registered a patent in Germany for orthopedic implant designs and new technologies in the field. He is also very active in AI development within the healthcare sector. Furthermore, he earned multiple certificates in Medical Informatics from Siegen University in Germany. He leads international trauma workshops, cadaver labs, and live surgical demonstrations. His hands-on training and evidence-based approach have improved orthopedic education globally.

Currently, Prof. Dr. Ahmed Almousa Orthopedic Surgeon serves as CEO of Sportklinik Hellersen operations in the Middle East, Asia, and Africa. Fluent in Arabic, German, and English, he treats a diverse patient population and promotes excellence in musculoskeletal health across regions.
expertise: Orthopaedic and Trauma Surgery (German Board Certified)
Minimally Invasive Surgery and Targeted Rehabilitation

He is American- and British-board certified and holds PhD and Master’s degrees in Neurobiology. Additionally, he is certified by the American Academy and Board of Regenerative Medicine (ABRM). This reflects a strong integration of neuroscience, surgery, and regenerative medicine.

Dr. Mohammed Al-Jumaily combines advanced techniques such as stem cell therapy, PRP (platelet rich plasma), and [minimally invasive procedures](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/minimally-invasive-surgery-in-dubai-2026-your-complete-guide-with-healthhub-clinics/) with conventional medical and surgical treatments. This approach achieves effective outcomes. His clinical expertise includes endoscopic spinal and brain surgery, kyphoplasty, vertebroplasty, and the management of spinal cord neoplasms and tumors. Moreover, Dr Al-Jumaily’s approach focuses on preserving natural anatomy and reducing disruption to daily life. He achieves this through careful and precise treatment planning.

Dr. Al-Jumaily prioritises functional recovery, early return to daily activity, and personalised treatment planning. Through academic leadership, clinical practice, and regenerative medicine, he continues to contribute to the development of modern neuro-spinal care. Book your consultation today with Dr. Mohammed Al-Jumaily, Consultant Neurosurgeon and Spine Surgeon at HealthHub Clinic, for advanced brain and spine care.

These include General Medicine, Family Medicine, Paediatrics, Obstetrics and Gynaecology, Dental, General Surgery, Dermatology, Orthopaedics and Physiotherapy along with an attached Pharmacy.

branches.name: HealthHub – Al Qusais
branches.overview: Our Healthhub Clinic Al Qusais is a Multispecialty Primary Care Center that offers high quality healthcare across more than ten different specialties. These include Inhouse Laboratory, X-ray, Ultrasound, Radiology along with an attached Pharmacy.

branches.name: HealthHub – Al Warqa
branches.overview: Our Healthhub Clinic Al Warqa in Dubai is a Multispecialty Primary Care Center. It offers high-quality healthcare across different specialities including General Medicine, Internal Medicine, Paediatrics, Urology, Obstetrics and Gynaecology, Dentistry, Orthopaedics, Physiotherapy, X-ray, and Radiology. In addition, there is an attached Pharmacy.

branches.name: HealthHub – Arabian Center
branches.overview: HealthHub Clinic by Al-Futtaim at Arabian Center is a ‘community and family clinic’ located close to the surrounding residential communities such as Mizhar, Mirdif, Khawaneej and Muhaisnah to effectively assist the people in enhancing their health and wellness.

branches.name: HealthHub – Barsha Heights
branches.overview: HealthHub Clinic in Barsha Heights is a Multispecialty Primary care centre that offers high quality healthcare across several specialties including General Medicine, Paediatrics, Family Medicine, Neurosurgery, Obstetrics and Gynaecology, Dermatology, Dentistry along with an attached Pharmacy. What’s more, we accept all major insurances.

branches.name: HealthHub – Festival Plaza
branches.overview: HealthHub Clinics by Al-Futtaim, located at Festival Plaza Mall in Jebel Ali, is a multispecialty primary care center offering a wide range of healthcare services. If you are looking for a HealthHub Clinic in Jebel Ali, this location provides high-quality care across various medical specialties. This includes [Dermatology](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/dermatology/), General surgery, Family medicine, [Paediatrics](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/paediatrics/), [Obstetrics and gynaecology](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/obstetrics-gynaecology/), and [Radiology](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialty_category/radiology/) along with an attached Pharmacy.

branches.name: HealthHub – JVC (Jumeirah Village Circle)
branches.overview: HealthHub Clinic by Al-Futtaim at JVC (Jumeirah Village Circle) is a dedicated community and family clinic. It is strategically located at the heart of Jumeirah Village Circle. Surrounded by vibrant residential communities such as Jumeirah Village Triangle, Sports City, Motor City, and Arabian Ranches, the clinic is designed to support the healthcare needs of individuals and families. It offers convenience, accessibility, and exceptional medical care.

branches.name: HealthHub – International City
branches.overview: Our Healthhub Clinic International City is a Multispecialty Primary Care Center. It offers high quality healthcare across different specialties, including Paediatrics, [Obstetrics and Gynaecology](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/obstetrics-gynaecology/), [Dentistry](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/dentistry/), [Orthopaedics](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/orthopaedics/), Inhouse Laboratory, X-ray, Ultrasound, Radiology, and Physiotherapy. Additionally, there is an attached Pharmacy.

branches.name: HealthHub – Silicon Oasis
branches.overview: Our HealthHub Clinic Dubai Silicon Oasis is a Multispecialty Primary Care Center that offers high quality healthcare across more than ten different specialties. This includes Inhouse Laboratory, X-ray, Ultrasound, Radiology, Treadmill Test, Echocardiogram, [Physiotherapy](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/physiotherapy/) along with an attached Pharmacy.

text_content.title: About Us
text_content.clean_body:
# About Us

## Welcome to a New Way of Healthcare!

As partners to your well-being, HealthHub Clinics by Al-Futtaim and part of Al-Futtaim Health, we ensure that you always have access to the best medical services and facilities. It’s a new way of healthcare designed to meet your needs with a complete range of Smart Healthcare solutions.

A multi-speciality clinic, we offer the best medical expertise in specialised treatments, from ophthalmology to endocrinology. What makes HealthHub Clinics different is the right combination of advanced diagnostics, proven medical expertise and specialised services that work together for your well-being.



Years of excellence

6+



Experienced & Licensed Doctors

169+

Specialized Medical Fields

21+





Clinics Across the Region

11+

#### A center of Excellence, centered around you:

HealthHub Clinics offers multi-disciplinary resources and smart healthcare solutions, supported by a holistic and compassionate approach, understanding and quality care designed around your health.

If there’s a complex surgery involved, just leave it to our skilled team of doctors who deliver exceptional expertise with highly specialised treatments. As part of our focus on continuity of care, we even conduct regular research that translates into improved treatment options.

We believe that being a Center of Excellence starts by being Human Centric.

## Our Mission & Vision

## Vision

We aim to ensure well-being for everyone. To this end, we see ourselves as partners to your well-being at every step of your healthcare journey.

## Mission

To redefine the healthcare experience by delivering high quality, smart and integrated healthcare to enrich your life.

## Our Brand Promise

A new

way of

healthcare.

## Values

- Excellence
- Compassion
- Innovation
- Respect
- Ethical Practice

Founded in 2019, HealthHub Clinics is dedicated to transforming healthcare through accessible, innovative solutions. With a focus on patient care and well-being, we’ve built a comprehensive network that includes 12+ clinics, 30+ clinic facilities, 10+ pharmacies, and over 150 expert doctors.

Our multi-specialty network offers 20+ specialties, bringing together state-of-the-art medical technology and proven expertise to deliver exceptional care. Whether you need routine checkups, specialized treatments, or personalized wellness plans, we are here to support your health journey with the best care available.

HealthHub Clinics is more than just a healthcare provider; we are your trusted partner in health, delivering care that is not only accessible but also exceptional.

text_content.title: Patient rights and responsibilities
text_content.clean_body:
# Patient rights and responsibilities

#### Patient Rights

- Receive impartial care and respect of your personal values and beliefs from all staff without discrimination, according to DHA’s rules and regulations.
- Receive comprehensive medical care aimed at reaching proper medical diagnosis and treatment of your illness and/or your injury.
- Receive immediate care in emergency cases.
- Know the identity (name and specialty) of the physician responsible for your care. Receive comprehensive information about your diagnosis, proposed treatment, any changes in your health.
- status and causes of such changes, alternative treatments, probabilities of treatment success or failure, therapy advantages and disadvantages, possible problems related to treatment and expected results of ignoring the treatment in a simple understandable manner.
- Have an interpreter (upon availability) if the language presents a barrier to understanding details of your comprehensive medical care.
- Give your written general consent for treatment at HealthHub Clinic upon initial registration.
- Give your written informed consent before any medical procedures that entail your written consent (according to DHA’s rules and regulations) after receiving all information that you may need. This should include the procedure benefits, available alternatives and all possible risks.
- HealthHub Clinic encourages patients, parents or legal guardians to participate in planning and implementing the treatment with nurses and physicians.
- Obtain a medical report and a copy of medical test results (Upon your request), for which HealthHub Clinic may charge you according as per DHA’s rules and regulations.
- Expect privacy during the performance of all examinations, procedures, and treatment at HealthHub Clinic, and to have all of your information maintained confidentially.
- Choose the treating team doctor (upon availability and upon operational needs).
- Refuse the treatment. Thus, the treating doctor must inform you of the medical consequences of your refusal. Accordingly, you shall sign a form with your decision.
- Refuse examination or follow-up of your treatment details by any person not directly responsible for your care. For persons who are not directly involved in your treatment, they must have your prior permission to attend your case discussion, examination and treatment.
- Be protected during treatment from any physical, verbal or psychological assault.
- Receive information from the treating doctor (in case you would like to donate any body organ) about donation process including advantages and potential disadvantages.
- Have a family member or guardian as an escort depending on your availability and your health status, as per DHA’s rules and regulations. However, due to medical reasons, this may not be allowed.
- Receive complete explanation of causes for transferring you to another care centre, consequent obligations (financial and administrative – if any) and alternatives. HealthHub Clinic will make all necessary arrangements to obtain the alternate medical centre’s approval to receive the referred patient before starting the transfer process.
- Receive (Upon your request) an itemised bill explaining all charges regardless paid by yourself or by other sources.
- You have the right to suggest and complain about services.
- View your medical record under the supervision of the treating doctor or medical team staff, according to DHA’s rules and regulations.
- You have the right to get appropriate assessment and management of pain through well-known therapies and to get all necessary information in this regard.
- In case of any new scientific research conducted by HealthHub Clinic pertaining to your treatment, your doctor will inform you on all related issues including potential benefits and risks, therapeutic alternatives and medical research protocol details.
- If you are asked to participate in medical research, you have the right to give a written consent or refuse.
- You have the right to end your participation at any time for any reason. This will not compromise the quality of medical services provided to you.
- HealthHub Clinic is committed to provide terminally ill and dying patients with decent and compassionate care respecting their unique needs, according to DHA’s regulations.
- Get a second opinion within or outside the clinic without fear of compromise to your care.

#### Patient Responsibilities

- Respect HealthHub Clinic rules and regulations.
- Show consideration for others and deal with other patients and staff with respect.
- Respect the privacy and comfort of other patients.
- Provide complete and accurate information about present complaints, PAT illness, previous hospitalisation and treatment and any known drug allergy.
- Follow the treating doctor’s instructions.
- Bear the responsibility for refusing or not following the treatment plan, after being informed about the potential consequences of this decision.
- Attend the appointment on time. If you want to cancel it, inform the Appointment Office 48 hours in advance.
- Respect the priority given to emergency cases.
- Observe safety regulations including the no-smoking policy, maintaining the cleanliness of the clinic, hand hygiene and infection control procedures.
- Ensure that payments are settled promptly for any services at HealthHub Clinic (if any).
- Give requested samples and attend medical check-up on time.
- Avoid bringing valuable personal belongings to the clinic. HealthHub Clinic will not be held responsible for loss of/damage to such belongings.
- Photographing or videotaping of staff, patients, visitors, physicians or interior areas of the clinic is prohibited unless written permission is obtained in advance.

text_content.title: Privacy Policy & Rights
text_content.clean_body:
# Privacy Policy & Rights

## Please read these terms of use carefully before using the site

Al-Futtaim Group company (Al-Futtaim Health) maintains this Web Site /application and all the information, communications, software, scripting, photos, text, video, graphics, music, sounds, images and other materials and services found on the Site (collectively ‘Content’), for the use of its customers, employees and members of the general public but only for the lawful purposes described below. Such content is provided as a convenience to its customers and to the general public. Al Futtaim understands and respects users privacy and it is committed to protect it. By visiting the HealthHub Portal and using our Smart Applications, users agree to the practices stated in this policy. Please read our Privacy Policy carefully to understand how we collect and use information.

## Information Collection:

### What personal information we collect about you?

Any data related to a specific natural person, or related to a natural person that can be identified directly or indirectly through linking the data, through the use of identification elements such as his name.

We collect information about you when you voluntarily register with us to receive company related alerts, complete our online information request form, and complete any surveys or feedback forms. We use cookies to collect information about your use of our website (technical data).

We may collect, use, store and transfer different kinds of personal data about you including your first name, last name, title, gender, occupation, address, e-mail address, telephone numbers, feedback and survey responses, selected communication preferences, which you provide voluntarily.

We may also collect, use and share aggregated data such as statistical or demographic data for any purpose. Aggregated data may be derived from your personal information but is not considered personal information in law as this information does not, directly or indirectly, reveal your identity. For example, we may aggregate your usage data to calculate the percentage of users accessing a specific website feature. However, if we combine or connect aggregated data with your personal information so that it can, directly or indirectly, identify you, we treat the combined data as personal information which will be used in accordance with this notice.

We do not collect any special categories of personal data about you (this includes details about your race or ethnicity, religious or philosophical beliefs, sex life, sexual orientation, political opinions, trade union membership, information about your health and genetic and biometric data). Nor do we collect any information about criminal convictions and offences. This website is not intended for children and we do not knowingly collect data relating to children.

## How we collect your personal information

### **We use different methods to collect personal information from and about you, including through:**

### Direct interactions

You may provide certain personal information (such as your name, address, telephone and e-mail address) by filling in forms or by corresponding with us by post, phone, e-mail or otherwise. This includes personal data you provide when you register for e-mail alerts on this website; request information to be sent to you; complete and submit a survey; or provide feedback to us.

### Automated technologies or interactions

As you interact with our website, we may automatically collect technical data about your equipment, browsing actions and patterns. We collect this by using cookies. Please see our cookie policy in section 11 below for further details. Through analytics, we use anonymized aggregated data such as statistical or demographic data.

### Third parties

We may receive personal data about you or aggregated technical data from external services providers contracted by Al Futtaim Health to host or maintain certain sections of this website.

#### PURPOSE

To communicate with you in accordance with your selected preference, such as registering you for alerts; communicating alerts, surveys, financial and other information relating to the Company with you; responding to an information request by you.

To manage our relationship with you, which may include: notifying you about changes to our terms or privacy policy; asking you to take a survey or provide feedback.

To administer and protect our business and this website (including troubleshooting, data analysis, testing, system maintenance, support, reporting and hosting of data, compliance with legal or regulatory obligations and establishing, exercising or defending our legal rights)

To deliver relevant website content to you and measure or understand the effectiveness of the information we present.

To use data analytics to improve our website, products/services, marketing, customer relationships and experiences.

#### LAWFUL BASIS FOR PROCESSING

To communicate with you in accordance with your preference.

Performance of a contract with you.

Necessary to comply with a legal obligation.

Necessary for our legitimate interests (to keep our records updated and to study how customers use our products/services).

Necessary for our legitimate interests (for running our business, provision of administration and IT services, network security, to prevent fraud and in the context of a business re organization or group restructuring exercise).

Necessary to comply with a legal obligation.

Necessary for our legitimate interests (to study how visitors use our website, to develop them, to grow our business and to inform our communication strategy).

Necessary for our legitimate interests (to define types of visitors to our website and to keep our website updated and relevant).

## Information usage

As summarized below, we only use your personal information to pursue our legitimate interests (or those of a third party), and your interests and fundamental rights do not override those interests; to comply with a legal obligation; for any other purpose that you have agreed with us; or otherwise permitted by law.

### Purpose

### Lawful Basis for Processing

To communicate with you in accordance with your selected preference, such as registering you for alerts; communicating alerts, surveys, financial and other information relating to the Company with you; responding to an information request by you.

To communicate with you in accordance with your preference.

To manage our relationship with you, which may include: notifying you about changes to our terms or privacy policy; asking you to take a survey or provide feedback.

Performance of a contract with you.

Necessary to comply with a legal obligation.

Necessary for our legitimate interests (to keep our records updated and to study how customers use our products/services).

To administer and protect our business and this website (including troubleshooting, data analysis, testing, system maintenance, support, reporting and hosting of data, compliance with legal or regulatory obligations and establishing, exercising or defending our legal rights)

Necessary for our legitimate interests (for running our business, provision of administration and IT services, network security, to prevent fraud and in the context of a business re organization or group restructuring exercise).

Necessary to comply with a legal obligation.

To deliver relevant website content to you and measure or understand the effectiveness of the information we present.

Necessary for our legitimate interests (to study how visitors use our website, to develop them, to grow our business and to inform our communication strategy).

To use data analytics to improve our website, products/services, marketing, customer relationships and experiences.

Necessary for our legitimate interests (to define types of visitors to our website and to keep our website updated and relevant).

## Permission for personal data access for smart applications

Depending on the User’s specific device, smart Application may request certain permissions that allow it to access the User’s device Data as described below:

By default, these permissions must be granted by the User before the respective information can be accessed. Once the permission has been given, it can be revoked by the User at any time. In order to revoke these permissions, Users may refer to the device settings or contact the Owner for support at the contact details provided in the present document.

The exact procedure for controlling app permissions may be dependent on the User’s device and software.

Please note that the revoking of such permissions might impact functioning of certain features and services of smart Application.

If User grants any of the permissions listed below, the respective Personal Data can be processed (i.e. accessed) by the smart Application.

### Calendar

Application may ask for Calendar permission to schedule calls for teleconsultations.

### Camera

This permission has been used to access the device camera for processing OCR on user’s identification documents.

### Storage and Photos/Media/Files

Storage permission is needed in order to store captured images from the camera and then later access those images if required.

### Microphone permission

Allows accessing and recording microphone audio from the User’s device to enable Calling and Chatting feature with Medical staff.​

## Marketing and Advertising

We do not use your personal information for marketing or advertising purposes. We strive to provide you with choices regarding certain personal data uses, particularly around marketing and advertising.

## Change of Purpose

We will only use your personal information for the purposes for which we collected it, unless we reasonably consider that we need to use it for another reason and that reason is compatible with the original purpose.

If we need to use your personal information for an unrelated purpose, we will notify you and we will explain the legal basis which allows us to do so.

Please note that we may process your personal information without your knowledge or consent, in compliance with the above rules, where this is required or permitted by law.

## Agents or Service Providers

We outsource the processing of certain functions and/or information to third parties. When we do outsource the processing of your personal information to third parties or provide your personal information to third-party service providers, we oblige those third parties to protect your personal information with appropriate security measures in accordance with our standards and applicable law.

## Promotional material

Names and e-mail addresses to affiliated service providers \[for the purposes of distributing promotional materials, surveys and questionnaires or other information that you have said you are willing to receive\].

## How we secure your personal information?

Your personal information shall be treated as confidential and collected, processed and stored by Al Futtaim Health and our service providers in a manner that ensures appropriate security thereof, including protection against unauthorized or unlawful processing, destruction or damage, using appropriate technical or organizational measures, which include:

- identity and access management;
- infrastructure and operations security;
- vulnerability management;
- business continuity planning;
- disaster recovery planning; and
- security awareness

We have put in place procedures to deal with any suspected data security breach and will notify you and any applicable regulator of a suspected breach where we are legally required to do so.

While Al Futtaim Health will use all reasonable endeavors to ensure the integrity, security and confidentiality of all personal information submitted and/or obtained from a user, it will not be held liable under any circumstances if such information is compromised, disseminated or otherwise disclosed through conduct outside the reasonable control of Al Futtaim Health such as hacking, infection by “viruses”, “Trojan Horses” or any other computer programming routines or software that are intended to damage, detrimentally interfere with, surreptitiously intercept or expropriate any system, data or personal information.

## Cookies

Cookies are used to customize users visit and enhance the user surfing experience. It is possible to set most web browsers to reject cookies, accept, or delete these files. However, the refusal or removing cookies may obstruct your user experience.

## Social media

Users of social media (eg, Facebook.com, Twitter.com, LinkedIn.com, Instagram etc.) shall be in compliance with the applicable laws & regulations, respectful of the larger community by complying with the terms and policies of each Social Media Host.

Users are encouraged to contribute comments that are respectful and for further discussion on our social media sites, but users shall avoid making comments that might be considered Confrontational, Offensive, Discriminatory, Profane, Off-topic, Spam (i.e, unsolicited promotion of a third -party business), Mis privacy-leading and Fake.

Al Futtaim Health reserves the right to remove comments or content on our social media sites that fit into any one of the above categories, or for any other reason, to preserve the integrity of our social media sites. We may block further posting on our social media sites by any individual who violates this Privacy Policy.

Any comments or content posted by the users do not reflect, in any way, Al Futtaim Health’s opinion.

## Information Security Controls

Al Futtaim Health has implemented appropriate controls to protect and safeguard the privacy of user’s personal information shared or collected by Al Futtaim Health.

Where appropriate, encryption methods are used to protect information, which is deemed sensitive, or any other data that should remain secure to meet Federal, Local legal requirements.

## Who we share your personal information?

In accordance with applicable law your personal information may be shared with:

**Locally or Internationally within Al Futtaim Health**

The Al Futtaim Health is an international healthcare services group, with the Company’s registered office in the UAE. The Group has plans of expanding its operating divisions outside the United Arab Emirates. As such our information systems or those of service providers may be in different countries. This may result in the transfer of your personal information might end up in one of those information systems to another country, and that country may have a different level of data protection regulation than yours. By giving us personal information, you consent to this kind of transfer of your personal information. No matter what country your personal information is in, you can expect a similar degree of protection in respect of your personal information which will be processed in accordance with our privacy and data protection policy and applicable laws.

**Agents or service providers**

We outsource the processing of certain functions and/or information to third parties. When we do outsource the processing of your personal information to third parties or provide your personal information to third-party service providers, we oblige those third parties to protect your personal information with appropriate security measures in accordance with our standards and applicable law.

**Promotional material**

Names and e-mail addresses to affiliated service providers \[for the purposes of distributing promotional materials, surveys and questionnaires or other information that you have said you are willing to receive\].

**Business transfers**

Third parties to whom we may choose to sell, transfer, or merge parts of our business or our assets. Alternatively, we may seek to acquire other businesses or merge with them. If a change happens to our business, then the new owners may use your personal information in the same way as set out in this privacy notice.

**Legal requirements**

We reserve the right to disclose any personal information we have concerning you if we are compelled to do so by a court of law, requested to do so by a governmental entity, or if we determine it is necessary or desirable to comply with the law or to protect or defend our rights or property in accordance with applicable laws. We also reserve the right to retain personal information collected and to process such personal information to comply with accounting, tax rules, regulations and any specific record retention laws.

We require all third parties to respect the security of your personal information and to treat it in accordance with the law. We do not allow our third-party service providers to use your personal information for their own purposes and only permit them to process your personal information for specified purposes and in accordance with our instructions.

## Modifications

Al Futtaim Health reserves the right to modify or amend the Privacy Policy at any time and the effective date will be posted at the beginning of the Privacy Policy. It is advisable to check the Privacy Policy on a regular basis for any changes.

## Your rights in relation to our use of personal information

Subject to certain exceptions, you have rights under relevant data protection law in relation to our use of your personal information, including to:

- **Request access to your personal information** held by us, together with an explanation of the categories of personal information being processed, the purposes of such processing, and the categories of third parties to whom the personal information may be disclosed;

- **Request a correction of your personal information** if it is inaccurate or incomplete

- **Request restriction of processing or object to certain uses of your personal information**(which includes direct marketing, and processing based on legitimate interests or the performance of a task in the public interest/exercise of official authority (including profiling) and processing for purposes of scientific or historical research and statistics) on grounds relating to your particular situation;

- **Request the erasure of your personal information**, or restrict its use, in certain circumstances (for example you can request that we erase your personal information where the personal information is no longer necessary for the purpose for which it was collected (unless certain exceptions apply) and

- **Withdraw any consents** you have provided in respect of our use of your personal information.

## How we secure your personal information?

We have put in place procedures to deal with any suspected data security breach and will notify you and any applicable regulator of a suspected breach where we are legally required to do so.

While Al Futtaim Health will use all reasonable endeavors to ensure the integrity, security and confidentiality of all personal information submitted and/or obtained from a user, it will not be held liable under any circumstances if such information is compromised, disseminated or otherwise disclosed through conduct outside the control of Al Futtaim Health such as hacking, infection by “viruses”, “Trojan Horses” or any other computer programming routines or software that are intended to damage, detrimentally interfere with, surreptitiously intercept or expropriate any system, data or personal information.

## Data retention

All data will be retained as per the UAE regulations.

If you have questions about the Al Futtaim Health Privacy Policy, please contact us via e-mail at: Info.HealthHub@alfuttaim.com

IF YOU DO NOT AGREE TO THESE TERMS, DO NOT USE THE SITE/APPLICATION.

text_content.title: Telehealth
text_content.clean_body:
# Telehealth

[Get Appointment](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/telehealth/#teleform)

## Providing accessible healthcare through our online consultation

HealthHub Clinics by Al-Futtaim provides accessible healthcare to all through our online consultation:

Digital Health services such as teleconsultation enable HealthHub Clinics by Al-Futtaim to extend their reach and improve their efficiency and effectiveness, while still maintaining high-quality care and attention to patient safety.

HealthHub Clinics has incorporated ethical statements and policies into their standard operating procedures to ensure adherence to strict ethical and professional standards, while assuring the quality of care and patient safety, and following evidence-based guidelines, and all federal and local regulations.

## Real-time, interactive and advanced technology to connect providers and patients

**All communication with the patient (verbal,visual or written), are documented** into the patient’s unique medical record, which is part of an integrated healthcare management system. This is to ensure continuity of care and access to the same information by all HealthHub providers whenever required.

**We deliver services in a culturally competent manner** that takes into account the patient’s age, disability status, ethnicity, language, gender identity and sexual orientation, geographical location, language, religion, and socio-economic status.

Through our vast clinical network **and partnerships with other providers,** we have access to available medical resources in proximity to the patient.

## Telehealth: A Modern Approach to Healthcare

Our **digital health services**, such as **teleconsultation**, enable HealthHub Clinics to extend their reach and enhance both the efficiency and effectiveness of care. We continue to prioritize patient safety while providing high-quality, compassionate care, leveraging advanced technology to improve your healthcare experience.

**Seamless Communication and Patient Safety**

Our **real-time, interactive telehealth technology** allows seamless communication between healthcare providers and patients. All patient interactions—whether verbal, visual, or written—are securely documented in the patient’s unique medical record. This ensures continuity of care, allowing all HealthHub providers to access critical health information when needed.

**Connecting You to Medical Resources with Our Extensive Network**

HealthHub Clinics has an extensive clinical network, allowing us to connect patients with nearby medical resources and providers when needed. Whether you require specialized care or routine follow-ups, we ensure that you receive the right support through our telehealth platform.

**Easy Access to Telehealth Consultation with HealthHub**

Through our **innovative telehealth platform**, you can easily select your preferred doctor and specialty, along with the most convenient time slot for your consultation. Whether you’re at home, at work, or anywhere else, you can join your online consultation without the hassle of commuting.

**What You Need for a Telehealth Consultation**

All you need for an online consultation is a **webcam** on your mobile phone, tablet, or laptop, and a stable **internet connection**. You can complete your entire registration process online, including uploading relevant medical documents, lab reports, and e-signing consent forms. It’s fast, secure, and convenient.

**Lab Tests and Home Services**

If further investigation is required, our doctors can Connect you with appropriate healthcare providers. For lab tests, our **mobile team** can visit your home for sample collection. This is part of our holistic approach to care, ensuring that your health needs are met at every step of the process.

**Access Your Medical Records to receive Coordinated Care**

Our healthcare professionals have instant access to your **electronic medical records (EMR)**, ensuring they can diagnose, treat, and provide recommendations for your condition based on the most up-to-date information available. During your consultation, you can receive:

- Medical guidance and consultation support

- Second opinions on previous diagnoses

- Ongoing care and support as recommended by your HealthHub specialist.

- HealthHub will guide you on the next steps regarding your next steps for your healthcare journey.


**View Your Lab Results and Care recommendations on the HealthHub App**

Once your lab tests are completed, you can conveniently review your lab results and medical reports via the **HealthHub App**. If further treatment or Follow-up care options discussed, your HealthHub specialist will discuss options with you, and guide you on the best course of action.

**Seamless Payment and Ongoing Care**

After your consultation, if applicable, you will receive an **online payment link** to securely complete the payment process. This ensures a hassle-free experience from start to finish, with all the convenience of modern healthcare solutions.



#### To get TeleHealth appointment, simply fill out and submit the form, we will call you back.

# Anaesthesiology

[Find doctors](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/anaesthesiology/#finddoctors)

### Expert Anaesthetist in Dubai Ensuring Safe and Comfortable Surgery

At HealthHub Day Surgery Center, our anaesthetist in Dubai are highly trained, DHA board certified specialists in **Anaesthesiology**. They provide expert care before, during, and after surgical or diagnostic procedures, ensuring your safety, comfort, and effective pain management.

### What Our Anaesthetists Do

Our **anaesthesia specialists** carefully evaluate each patient before surgery, selecting the most suitable anaesthesia method based on the procedure type, duration, patient’s age, and medical condition. Services include:

- **General Anaesthesia** – for complete unconsciousness and pain relief
- **Procedural Sedation** – safe sedation for minor procedures
- **Regional / Local Anaesthesia** – targeted numbness while remaining alert
- **Monitored Anaesthesia Care** – continuous supervision for minimal risk procedures

During every procedure, our anaesthetists continuously monitor vital signs, cooperate closely with surgeons, and provide personalized **postoperative pain management** to ensure a smooth recovery.

### Why Choose HealthHub for Anaesthesia

At HealthHub, all anaesthetist in Dubai **practices** follow:

- Latest medical standards and protocols
- Dubai Health Authority (DHA) regulations
- International best practices for safety and quality

Our goal is to deliver maximum safety, comfort, and effective pain relief, allowing patients to return home on the same day with confidence.

# Cardiology

### Take Charge of Your Heart Health with Dubai’s Best Cardiologists

Have you been experiencing chest pain, shortness of breath, or dizziness? These could signal a heart problem that needs immediate attention. At HealthHub Clinics, our **cardiology specialists in Dubai** provide comprehensive care to ensure your heart stays healthy and strong.

### Comprehensive Heart Care

Our **best cardiologists in Dubai** offer expert care, combining advanced technology with years of clinical experience. From accurate diagnosis to long-term heart health management, our services include:

- **High Cholesterol Management** – controlling cholesterol for better heart health
- [**Hypertension Treatment**](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/articles/hypertension-treatment/) – blood pressure care and monitoring
- **ECG Tests and Holter Monitoring** – track heart rhythm for early detection
- **Advanced Valve Repairs** – surgical planning for heart valve issues
- **Advanced Aortic Arch Procedures** – aortic repair surgery and planning
- **Laboratory Testing** – fast, accurate diagnostic results
- [**Blood Pressure Monitoring**](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/articles/blood-pressure-monitoring/) – proactive heart health management
- **Chest X-Rays and Treadmill Stress Tests** – assess cardiac function and endurance

At HealthHub’s **cardiology department**, we deliver personalized treatment plans to prevent heart complications, manage chronic conditions, and provide rapid interventions when needed. Our goal is to help you enjoy a healthier, more active life with peace of mind.

### FAQ

What are the symptoms of a heart problem?

Symptoms may include chest pain, shortness of breath, dizziness, palpitations, fatigue, and swelling in the legs,ankles, or feet.

Is chest pain something to worry about?

It’s always a good idea to check in with a doctor, especially if it comes on suddenly or doesn’t improve with over-the-counter meds. If you feel pain spreading to your arms, back, neck, or jaw—or experience tightness or heaviness in your chest—seek emergency help right away. Your health comes first!

Why is your heart racing?

It’s often caused by things like stress, exercise, or even certain medications. Most of the time, it’s harmless, but if it keeps happening, a quick visit to your doctor can rule out anything more serious.

Can stress affect my heart?

Yes, chronic stress can contribute to high blood pressure, arrhythmias, and other heart conditions.
Managing stress is vital for heart health.

text_content.clean_body:
# Dietetics and Nutrition

[Find doctors](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/clinical-dietitian-and-nutritionist/#finddoctors)

### Building healthy habits

Nutrition is the foundation of health, and Dietetics and Nutrition in Dubai are gaining importance for residents aiming for a healthier lifestyle. While we often associate a nutritious diet with maintaining an ideal weight, it plays an even larger role. For example, it helps manage specific health conditions, improves quality of life, and promotes long-term wellness.

If you’re looking to lose weight, manage a medical condition like diabetes, or support a healthy pregnancy, our expert nutritionists and dieticians offer the best diet plans in Dubai. Moreover, they use evidence-based strategies to provide the guidance you need. When it comes to Dietetics and Nutrition in Dubai, you get professional support tailored to your goals.

### Nutrition plans for different needs

> **1\. Tailored Nutrition for Weight Loss Goals**

Weight loss is a top priority for many, but the “one-size-fits-all” meal plans flooding the internet don’t work for everyone. Clinical Dietitians provide personalized plans that consider your metabolism, eating habits, activity level, and even food preferences. With Dietetics and Nutrition in Dubai, customization is based on local and individual requirements.

> **2\. Nutrition for a Healthy Pregnancy**

Pregnancy is a critical time when a woman’s nutritional needs increase to support both her health and the baby’s development. The role of clinical dietitians during pregnancy extends far beyond suggesting prenatal vitamins. For example, a balanced breakfast of oatmeal topped with fresh fruits and nuts can provide fiber and antioxidants. It also keeps energy levels steady throughout the day. Regular consultations ensure that mothers are eating

> **3\. Diabetes Management with Nutrition**

For individuals managing diabetes—whether Type 1, Type 2, or gestational—food choices are critical. Clinical dietitians specialize in crafting meal plans that help stabilize blood sugar levels while considering personal preferences and cultural foods. Enough calories and nutrients without over indulging, promoting a healthy weight gain trajectory, are ensured when following the expertise found in Dietetics and Nutrition in Dubai.

### FAQ

What do Clinical Dietitians and Nutritionists do?

Clinical dietitians and nutritionists specialize in translating the science of nutrition into realistic and personalized goals. Their expertise includes assessing patients' nutritional needs, creating tailored meal plans, offering dietary advice, and even integrating modern technology, such as nutrition apps, to monitor progress. Unlike generic online guides, they consider medical history, lifestyle, and even cultural preferences to design highly individual solutions.

What a diabetes-focused nutritional plan may include?

• Balancing Carbohydrates: Dietitians guide you on portioning carb-rich foods like rice and bread while combining them with protein and healthy fats to prevent spikes in blood sugar.

• Simplifying Glycemic Index (GI): Foods with a low GI ensure slower sugar absorption—a focus area for controlling diabetes. Think lentils, sweet potatoes, or whole grains.

• A Focus on Fiber: Fiber slows down sugar absorption and helps in maintaining gut health. Foods like vegetables, nuts, and seeds make regular appearances on a diabetes-friendly meal plan.

How to start your nutrition journey?

• First, identify your specific goals. Are you managing a condition? Trying to lose weight? Or maintaining health during pregnancy?

• Next, consult our professional dietitian at HealthHub who will create a comprehensive plan tailored exactly to your needs and goals.

• Finally, integrate tools such as nutrition tracking apps or wearable health devices into your routine. Many nutritionists now offer insights based on tracking data, making your goals more achievable than ever.

# Dentistry

### Premier Dental Care You Can Trust

At HealthHub Clinics, we understand how important it is to keep your smile healthy and bright. As one of the top dentist clinics in Dubai, we provide a wide range of dental services to help you face the world with confidence. If you are looking for a Dental Clinic in Dubai, you’ll find expert care and modern solutions at HealthHub Clinics. Additionally, choosing a Dental Clinic in Dubai means access to state-of-the-art technology for all your oral health needs.

Our care includes:

- Relief for toothaches and swollen gums
- Solutions for tooth sensitivity
- Expert [**orthodontic care**](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/dentistry/), including braces and Invisalign
- **Cosmetic dentistry** services such as Hollywood Smile makeovers, Lumineers, and Smile Design

### Cosmetic Dentistry for a Confident Smile

At HealthHub Dentistry, everyone deserves a smile they can be proud of. Our [**cosmetic dentistry**](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/hollywood-smile-design-dental-implants-clinic-in-dubai/) services enhance your smile’s beauty and restore confidence. If you’re seeking a Dental Clinic in Dubai for cosmetic options, HealthHub Dentistry has a proven track record. From teeth whitening to porcelain veneers that cover chips and gaps, our **dentists** use the latest techniques to deliver natural-looking, flawless results.

### Orthodontics & Invisalign Services

**Orthodontics** focuses on diagnosing, preventing, and correcting misaligned teeth and jaw issues. We offer both traditional braces and modern clear aligners like **Invisalign**. Invisalign provides a nearly invisible, comfortable, and removable solution that gradually shifts teeth into place. With advanced orthodontic care, patients of all ages can achieve a well-aligned smile while improving overall dental health. Furthermore, choosing a Dental Clinic in Dubai ensures you get comprehensive orthodontic solutions tailored to your needs. Visiting a Dental Clinic in Dubai is the best way to maintain your smile for life.

### FAQ

When should I visit the dentist?

Regular dental visits are crucial for maintaining oral health. It's recommended to visit your dentist at least once every six months for a checkup and cleaning. However, if you're experiencing pain, discomfort, or any changes in your oral health, it's best to schedule an appointment as soon as possible.

How much does teeth cleaning cost in Dubai?

The cost of teeth cleaning in Dubai can vary depending on the clinic and treatment type. At Health Hub Clinics, we offer competitive pricing for our cleaning services. Contact us for an estimate based on your needs.

What are the benefits of cosmetic dentistry?

Cosmetic dentistry not only improves the appearance of your smile but can also enhance your self-esteem and overall oral health. Procedures like teeth whitening, veneers, and dental implants help correct imperfections and restore your confidence.

What are the best braces for adults?

When it comes to adult braces, clear aligners like Invisalign are a popular choice for their discreet appearance and comfort. However, traditional braces are also effective and may be recommended depending on your dental needs.

# Dermatology

### Healthy Skin, Radiant You: Best Dermatologists in Dubai

Your skin reflects your health, vitality, and confidence. At HealthHub Clinics, one of the leading dermatology clinics in Dubai, our expert dermatologists provide advanced skincare solutions to help you achieve healthy, youthful skin. Whether you’re managing acne, reducing scars, or exploring anti aging treatments, our team offers the best skin care treatment in Dubai.

With cutting edge technology and personalized care, we are recognized among the best dermatologists in Dubai for delivering effective and safe results.

### Flawless Skin Starts Here

Maintaining healthy, radiant skin begins with early treatment and regular visits to a **dermatologist**. Our comprehensive care addresses a wide range of skin, hair, and nail concerns:

- **Acne vulgaris** – acne treatment solutions
- **Acne scars & Melasma** – scar and pigmentation treatment, dark spots, keloids
- **Hair loss & Alopecia** – hair regrowth solutions
- **Hair and nails disorders** – hair and nail care
- **Anti-aging & skin rejuvenation injectables** – Botox, fillers, skin boosters, Biostimulators, Profhilo, PDRN, PRP, Mesotherapy, threads
- **Targeted Lipolysis** – injectable fat removal
- **Ear piercing** – medical ear piercing
- **Skin infections** – treatment of fungal, viral, and bacterial infections
- **Eczema, allergies, dermatitis, rashes** – skin irritation relief and allergy testing
- **Psoriasis & urticaria** – chronic skin condition care
- **Skin tags, warts, cysts** – diagnosis and removal
- **Skin biopsy** – tissue analysis for skin diseases and tumors

At HealthHub, our **dermatology specialists** combine expertise with the latest technology to ensure safe, effective treatments for all your skin, hair, and nail concerns.

text_content.clean_body:
# Endocrinology

[Find doctors](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/endocrinology/#finddoctors)

### From Diabetes to Thyroid Care – Best consultant endocrinologist in Dubai

Hormones play a vital role in your overall health. They influence everything from energy and metabolism to growth, bone health, and reproductive function. At HealthHub Clinics, our **best consultant endocrinologists in Dubai** provide expert care for a wide range of endocrine and metabolic conditions. This approach helps you achieve balance and wellness.

Our team of diabetes specialists in Dubai offers comprehensive management for both [Type 1 and Type 2 diabetes](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/treatments/diabetes-management/). This includes blood sugar control, insulin resistance management, and insulin therapy guidance. We also address thyroid dysfunction. Therefore, we help patients maintain optimal thyroid health and treat hormonal imbalances that may affect menstruation, fertility, or overall well-being.

For patients struggling with obesity, our endocrinologists provide tailored weight management plans. These include weight loss injections and lifestyle guidance. They aim at achieving sustainable results while improving metabolic health. In addition, we care for osteoporosis, vitamin D and calcium deficiencies, growth abnormalities, and other conditions affecting bone and [endocrine health](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/articles/endocrine-hypertension-in-dubai/).

Our specialists diagnose and treat complex hormonal disorders, including pituitary gland disorders like hyperprolactinemia and acromegaly. We also treat adrenal problems such as cortisol imbalance and endocrine hypertension. Additionally, we address puberty-related concerns like hirsutism or abnormal development. Further, we provide support for conditions like PCOS, hypogonadism, and menstrual irregularities. This process ensures personalized care for every patient.

Recognized as a leading center for affordable endocrinology services near you, HealthHub Clinics combines compassionate care with advanced technology to provide holistic treatment. Whether you need a diabetes specialist in Dubai, thyroid care, obesity management, or hormonal support, our team of best consultant endocrinologists in Dubai is here. We will guide you toward better health.




### The treatment that covers

High blood pressure management

### FAQ

When should I see an endocrinologist?

You should consider seeing an endocrinologist if you experience symptoms such as unexplained weight changes,
excessive thirst or urination, fatigue, frequent infections, hair loss, or irregular periods. Conditions like diabetes, thyroid imbalances, or hormonal disorders are also reasons to consult an endocrinologist.

How can I manage type 2 diabetes?

Managing type 2 diabetes involves controlling blood sugar levels through a combination of lifestyle changes, including
diet, regular exercise, and weight management. Medications, such as oral drugs or insulin, may also be prescribed to help regulate blood glucose levels.

What are the signs of thyroid problems in people with obesity?

Obesity can sometimes mask thyroid problems or make them more difficult to detect. Common signs of thyroid disorders
include unexplained weight gain, fatigue, dry skin, hair loss, sensitivity to cold, and changes in mood.

Can hypothyroidism cause weight gain?

Yes, hypothyroidism can lead to weight gain. When the thyroid is underactive, it produces fewer hormones, which can slow
down your metabolism.

What are the treatment options for obesity?

Treatment for obesity typically involves a combination of lifestyle changes, medications, and, in some cases, bariatric surgery.

# ENT

### Ear, Nose, and Throat Specialists in Dubai

Your ears, nose, and throat are essential to how you experience the world—whether it’s hearing a loved one’s laughter, enjoying the aroma of fresh coffee, or simply breathing deeply. At HealthHub Clinics, our best ENT doctors in Dubai provide expert care at our state-of-the-art ENT Clinic, ensuring nothing stands in the way of those precious moments.

Our specialists combine cutting-edge medical expertise with compassionate care to treat both minor issues and complex conditions. We provide personalized treatment for a wide range of ENT problems, including mastoidectomy and ear infection surgery, tympanoplasty for eardrum repair, [tonsillectomy](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/articles/tonsillectomy/), and advanced [thyroid treatment](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/articles/thyroid-health/) to support your overall health.

For sinus and nasal concerns, our ENT team offers Functional Endoscopic Sinus Surgery (FESS) and turbinectomy to improve airflow and relieve chronic [sinus conditions](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/articles/functional-endoscopic-sinus-surgery/). We also provide solutions for snoring and sleep apnea, helping you and your loved ones sleep better and breathe easier.

At HealthHub’s ENT Clinic in Dubai, our goal is simple: to restore your health, improve your quality of life, and provide care tailored to your unique needs. Whether it’s routine treatment or advanced surgical intervention, our best ENT doctors in Dubai are here to help you thrive.

# Family Medicine

[Find doctors](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/family-medicine/#finddoctors)

### Whole-hearted Care for Your family

Life’s journey is filled with moments, and at HealthHub Clinics, we’re here to keep you and your loved ones healthy through every one of them. Our **family medicine specialists in Dubai** provide personalized, comprehensive care for all ages. We treat unexpected illnesses and manage chronic conditions. In addition, we help you stay ahead with preventive care. This way, we ensure your family receives the best support.

As a trusted healthcare partner for families across Dubai, we pride ourselves on creating a welcoming space. Here, everyone—from toddlers to seniors—receives the attention they deserve. With a focus on functional medicine and compassionate care, we are redefining what it means to prioritize your family’s well-being.

### Family Medicine and Community Care at HealthHub

At HealthHub, our **family medicine specialists in Dubai** play a vital role in community care by offering expertise in public health, emergency and urgent care, and sports medicine. This holistic approach ensures that individuals and families receive personalized care. Additionally, it addresses broader health needs within the community.

### We Are Here For You

We understand how uncomfortable a flu or a migraine can be, but you don’t have to face it alone. Our **family medicine specialists in Dubai** are here to help you feel better and stay healthy with the right treatment and support.




### The treatment that covers

### FAQ

What’s the quickest way to ease migraine symptoms?

Start by taking over-the-counter NSAIDs like ibuprofen or aspirin for pain relief. Rest in a dark, quiet room to avoid light and noise triggers, steer clear of strong smells, use a cold compress or lower the room temperature for comfort.

What causes eczema in children?

Eczema is caused by a combination of genetic factors, immune system responses, and environmental triggers.

How can parents support a child with ADHD?

Provide structure, clear expectations, positive reinforcement, and involve teachers or counselors in the care plan.

What are the most common signs of OCD?

Repetitive thoughts (obsessions) and behaviors (compulsions) that cause distress and interfere with daily life.

What conditions do family medicine doctors treat?

They treat acute illnesses, chronic diseases, preventive care, mental health, and overall wellness for all age groups.

How long does a respiratory infection last?

Symptoms of a cold or upper respiratory infection typically last between 14 to 21 days. A dry, persistent cough may linger for up to three to four weeks. To aid in recovery, it’s important to stay hydrated by drinking plenty of fluids

What is the main cause of hypertension?

Hypertension, or high blood pressure, affects many adults and often goes unnoticed. Common causes include:
\- Smoking
\- Being overweight
\- Lack of physical activity
Regular checkups are essential for monitoring and managing hypertension.

# Gastroenterology

[Find doctors](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/gastroenterology/#finddoctors)

### Best Gastroenterologist in Dubai \| Expert Care for Gut Health

Good digestive health is the foundation of overall well being. When it’s compromised, it can affect more than just your stomach. At HealthHub Clinics, our experienced **gastroenterologists** at our **Gastroenterology Clinic in Dubai** specialize in treating a wide range of conditions affecting the pancreas, liver, [gallbladder](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/articles/gallbladder-stones-gallstones-treatment-in-dubai/), esophagus, stomach, small intestine, and [colon](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/colonoscopy-in-dubai-preparation-procedure-cost-when-you-need-one/). From common digestive issues to complex conditions, we provide the care and expertise needed to restore and maintain your gut health.

### Colorectal or Colon Cancer Screening by the Best Gastroenterologist in Dubai

At HealthHub, we provide advanced colorectal screening to ensure timely diagnosis and effective treatment. Our skilled team uses state-of-the-art diagnostic tools to detect potential issues early, allowing for better outcomes. Regular screenings are key to maintaining optimal digestive health and preventing serious complications.

**Comprehensive Colonoscopy Services at Our Gastroenterology Clinic:**

- Detection of inflamed tissues, ulcers, and abnormal growths
- Advanced imaging techniques for precise evaluation of the colon
- Regular screenings to prevent future health complications

**Early Detection and Diagnosis by Expert Gastroenterologists:**

- Colorectal cancer detection using advanced screening tools
- Identifying bowel disorders and causes of abdominal pain
- Monitoring inflamed tissues, stomach ulcers, and related conditions




### The treatment that covers

### Specialized Gastrointestinal Care

Digestive health management

### Gastric Reflux Disease (GERD)

Heartburn disorder treatment management

### Peptic Ulcer Disease

Stomac ulcers treatment management

### Colitis

Colon inflammation treatment management

### Gallbladder Stone

Gallstones treatment management

### Nutritional Issues

Dietary deficiencies management

### Irritable Bowel Syndrome (IBS)

Functional bowel disorder management

### Colon Polyps

Intestinal polyps treatment management

### Colorectal Cancer

Diagnosis and treatment management

### Breath Test

Diagnosis for Helicobacter pylori, Lactose intolerance and Intestinal bacterial overgrowth

### Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD)

Chronic inflammation of the digestive tract

### FAQ

How can I relieve my stomach pain?

Drink clear fluids like water and avoid coffee, tea, and alcohol. When you can eat, start with clear liquids and progress to bland foods like crackers, rice, bananas, or toast. Visiit a doctor for an accurate diagnosis and treatment plan.

Who is a gastroenterologist?

A gastroenterologist is the specialist who diagnoses, treats, and manages conditions related to the digestive system, providing both preventive care and specialized treatments for conditions like colitis, IBS, colon polyps, peptic ulcers etc.

How can I manage gastric reflux disease (GERD)?

GERD can be managed with lifestyle changes such as avoiding trigger foods, eating smaller meals, and elevating the head during sleep. Medications like proton pump inhibitors (PPIs) may also be prescribed.

What causes peptic ulcers, and how are they treated?

Peptic ulcers are often caused by an infection with Helicobacter pylori bacteria or the use of nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drugs (NSAIDs). Treatment typically involves antibiotics and medications to reduce stomach acid.

What are the early signs of colorectal cancer?

Early signs of colorectal cancer can include changes in bowel habits, rectal bleeding, and unexplained weight loss.

# General Practice

[Find doctors](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/general-medicine/#finddoctors)

### Your Trusted General Practice for Personalized, Modern Healthcare

Navigating health concerns can often feel overwhelming, but with the right General Practitioner GP at your side, care becomes more personal, innovative, and supportive. At HealthHub Clinic Dubai, we’re redefining patient care by delivering comprehensive healthcare services guided by empathy, technology, and a dedication to professionalism. Choosing a general practitioner in Dubai is essential for accessing high-quality, individualized care. We firmly believe healthcare should be accessible, understandable, and personal therefore our approach goes beyond primary care — we’ve intentionally designed services to enhance your wellbeing holistically.

### Why we need General Practitioner in Dubai, and Why is It Important?

A general practice serves at HealthHub in Dubai as the first point of contact for individuals seeking medical attention. A general practitioner in Dubai focuses on diagnosing, treating, and managing a wide range of health concerns while ensuring patients receive the care they need promptly. In fact, people often rely on a general medicine specialist for ongoing healthcare guidance. But our approach at HealthHub goes beyond primary care — we’ve intentionally designed services to enhance your experience at every level. By working with a skilled general practitioner in Dubai, you benefit from both expertise and a deep understanding of the local healthcare landscape.




### The treatment that covers

### Health Check-Ups

Annual physicals and wellness check-ups.

### Vaccinations

Vaccination visits for travel and routine vaccine updates, for adults and children

### Common illnesses

ENT conditions, Skin disorders, Bone and Joint pains, UTIs, Allergies

### Acute illnesses

Headaches/ Migraine, Abdominal pain, Respiratory infection, Common colds Flu

### Chronic Condition Management

Chronic diseases treatment plan

### Pediatric

Immunizations and developmental evaluations.

### Women's Health

Screening and family planning

### FAQ

When should I consult a GP?

Consult a GP for: Persistent cold, cough, or fever, Stomach pain or digestive issues, Mental health concerns, such as anxiety or depression, Minor cuts, bruises, or sprains.

What causes low blood pressure?

Low blood pressure, or hypotension, can happen for several reasons. Common causes include dehydration, blood loss, certain medications, or underlying health issues. If you're worried about low blood pressure, it’s important to consult a healthcare provider.

Which vaccinations does my child need?

It’s important for your child to receive vaccinations against serious diseases such as tuberculosis, hepatitis B, diphtheria, tetanus, whooping cough, Hib, polio, pneumococcal infection, rotavirus, measles, mumps, rubella, and chickenpox. These vaccines help safeguard your little one's health and ensure a brighter, healthier future.

Why do I feel dizzy?

Feeling dizzy can be caused by various factors. A sudden drop in blood pressure can cause lightheadedness or dizziness, especially when standing up quickly.

# General Surgery

[Find doctors](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/general-surgery/#finddoctors)

General Surgery in Dubai is often the first line of defense for many medical issues. In addition, it bridges gaps between specialties like [Gastroenterology](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/gastroenterology/), Oncology, and [Emergency medicine](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/a-life-saved-at-30000-feet-how-dubai-doctor-dr-cecil-kunnappillys-expertise-guided-a-critical-in-flight-emergency/). Its versatility makes it indispensable in both routine and emergency settings.

Choosing the right surgical care begins with trust, expertise, and innovation. That’s exactly what we deliver at Our Day Surgery Center at HealthHub. Located in the heart of Dubai, we combine advanced technology with compassionate care to offer excellence in general surgery. Our state-of-the-art facility is designed to meet international standards. Moreover, it is home to a multidisciplinary team of experienced specialists dedicated to your well-being before, during, and after your procedure.

### What Does a General Surgeon Do?

A general surgeon performs an array of crucial tasks, including:

- Hospital Management: Lead surgical teams and collaborate with other specialists to ensure coordinated care.
- Pre-Surgery Evaluation: Assess a patient’s condition to determine the necessity of surgery.
- Performing Surgeries: This includes operations on the appendix, gallbladder, colon, and other critical organs.
- Post-Surgery Care: Oversee recovery and manage any complications that may arise.

### Hemorrhoid Treatment

### Acute appendicitis

### Pilonidal sinus treatment

### Advanced Proctology Care

Treatment for hemorrhoids, fissures, fistulas, and more

### FAQ

When Should You See a General Surgeon?

Consult a general surgeon when symptoms or findings suggest a condition that may require surgical evaluation or intervention—such as a hernia, suspected gallbladder disease, persistent anorectal symptoms, a new or enlarging lump, or a non‑healing wound.

Can hernias heal on their own?

Hernias cannot heal without medical intervention. Surgery is the only way to repair a hernia. However, many people can manage a small hernia without immediate surgery, sometimes for months or even years. For some individuals, especially those with minor hernias, surgery may never be necessary.

What are hemorroids?

Hemorrhoids are a very common condition caused by increased pressure around the anus. This pressure can happen during pregnancy, childbirth, or as a result of constipation. When this occurs, the veins and tissue in the anal area swell, leading to hemorrhoids

text_content.title: Hair Transplant
text_content.clean_body:
# Hair Transplant

[Find doctors](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/hair-transplant/#finddoctors)

If you’re noticing a receding hairline or thinning crown, HealthHub Clinic in Dubai is here to help. We offer advanced **hair transplant** solutions in Dubai for both men and women. In particular, we have a special focus on treating **male pattern baldness** – to restore not just your hair, but your confidence and sense of well-being. Our approach blends medical expertise with an approachable, wellness-centered touch. As a result, you feel supported at every step of your hair restoration journey.

### **Advanced Techniques: FUE and Direct Hair Implantation for Superior Results**

HealthHub Clinics stays at the forefront of hair restoration by employing the latest proven techniques. Our hair transplant surgeons specialize in **[Long Hair Transplant](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/articles/long-hair-transplant/),** **Follicular Unit Extraction (FUE)** and [**Direct Hair Implantation technique**](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/articles/direct-hair-implantation-in-dubai/) – innovative methods that yield excellent results with minimal discomfort or downtime.




### The treatment that covers

### Follicular Unit Extraction (FUE)

Individual follicles are moved to pre‑made channels

### Direct Hair Implantation

Advanced technique using a pen to place grafts

### Long Hair Transplant

No‑shave direct hair implantation
