### FAQ

Am I a suitable candidate for a hair transplant?

If you are experiencing pattern baldness, thinning hair, or patchy hair loss and have healthy hair growth in a donor area (usually the back or sides of the scalp), you are likely a good candidate for a hair transplant. Ideal candidates are in good overall health and have realistic expectations. Our doctors will evaluate your scalp to ensure you have sufficient donor hair and that your hair loss has stabilized (for example, men with male pattern baldness often start in their late 20s or 30s once the pattern is more established). Both men and women can benefit from hair transplants, though the approach may differ slightly. During your consultation, we will determine if a hair transplant is the right solution for you or if other treatments should be considered first.

Is the hair transplant procedure painful?

Hair transplant surgery at HealthHub is performed under local anesthesia, so you won’t feel pain during the actual follicle removal or implantation. You might feel a little pinch or pressure when the anesthetic is administered, but after that the scalp goes numb. Throughout the procedure, we continually check to make sure you’re comfortable – many patients even relax, listen to music, or nap while we work. After the transplant, once the anesthesia wears off, it’s normal to have some tenderness, mild soreness or tightness in the scalp. However, this discomfort is usually very manageable and fades within a few days. We’ll provide you with pain relief medication and detailed post-op care instructions to minimize any soreness. Most patients are pleasantly surprised at how slight the pain is – often comparing it to the discomfort of a sunburn on the scalp, which is temporary.

Will a hair transplant leave scars?

Because we use FUE and Direct Hair Implantation techniques (which do not involve large incisions), scarring is minimal and barely noticeable. FUE may leave tiny round dot scars in the donor area where follicles were taken, but these dots are so small (usually less than 1mm) that they blend in with the surrounding skin and hair. Even with short hair, they are typically hard to see. There is no long linear scar, as would be the case with the older strip surgery method. In the transplanted areas on top of your head, you won’t have any visible scars at all – just new hair growing. We will also give you guidance on caring for your donor area so it heals as discreetly as possible. After full healing, most people have no visible sign of surgery, and they can style their hair however they please.

How long is the recovery time?

Recovery after an FUE or Direct Hair Implantation hair transplant is relatively quick. Most patients can go home shortly after the procedure and return to routine, non-strenuous activities within 2-3 days. If you have an office job or light duties, you might even go back to work after a long weekend. In the first week, you’ll need to be gentle with your scalp – no heavy workouts, swimming, or scratching/rubbing the transplanted area. There may be some minor swelling on your forehead or around the transplant zone for a few days (we provide a soft headband to help with this). Tiny scabs will form where grafts were placed; these usually shed off by around day 7-10. By two weeks out, most of the outward signs of surgery (like redness or scabs) have resolved, and you’ll look very much like your usual self, just with very short new hairs visible. We schedule follow-up appointments to check that you’re healing well. Following our aftercare instructions will ensure a smooth recovery. And remember, our team is always available if you have questions during your healing period.

When will I see results after my hair transplant?

Hair restoration is a gradual process, so patience is key. In the first few weeks after your transplant, it’s expected that the transplanted hairs will shed – this is completely normal and happens to almost everyone. The hair shafts fall out, but the transplanted follicles remain safely in place under the skin. After a shedding phase, the follicles enter a resting cycle before producing new hair. You should start noticing new hair growth from the transplanted follicles around 3 to 4 months post-surgery. From that point, the hairs will continue to grow and thicken. By about 6 months, many patients see a significant improvement in hair fullness and can appreciate the emerging results. The full, final results typically take around 9 to 12 months to become apparent, as the hair reaches normal length and density. The wait is well worth it – once grown, the transplanted hair is permanent. It will behave like your natural hair (because it is!), which means you can cut, style, and treat it just as you would otherwise. We’ll be with you during the follow-up period to monitor growth progress. For many patients, seeing that first new hair and watching their hairline fill in over time is an exciting and rewarding experience.

# Internal Medicine

[Find doctors](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/internal-medicine/#finddoctors)

### Towards Better Health

Internal Medicine specialists focus on preventing, diagnosing, and treating adult illnesses. Known as ‘general medicine,’ this field forms the foundation of comprehensive adult healthcare. It covers a wide range of conditions, from chronic diseases like [hypertension](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/articles/hypertension-treatment/) and diabetes to acute issues such as respiratory and [gastrointestinal disorders](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/articles/specialized-gastrointestinal-care-in-dubai/). At [HealthHub](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/), our experienced specialists deliver personalized care, supported by 12 clinics across Dubai for your convenience.

### Internal Medicine Specialists for Complex Conditions

For patients with multiple, interconnected health concerns, our Internal Medicine specialists manage complex conditions that require a multidisciplinary approach.

### FAQ

What are the cosymptoms of asthma?

Common symptoms include shortness of breath, wheezing, chest tightness, and coughing, especially at night or early morning.

How often should I check my blood pressure?

If you have high blood pressure, it’s recommended to check it regularly at home and during routine doctor visits.

What foods raise cholesterol?

Foods high in saturated fats (like red meat, full-fat dairy) and trans fats (found in processed foods) can raise cholesterol levels.

What foods should diabetics avoid?

Diabetics should avoid foods high in refined sugars and carbohydrates, such as sugary drinks, sweets, and processed foods. A balanced diet rich in fiber, whole grains, lean proteins, and healthy fats is recommended.

Can obesity casue diabetes?

Obesity is one of the primary risk factors for developing type 2 diabetes. Excess fat, especially around the abdomen, can make the body's cells more resistant to insulin, the hormone that helps regulate blood sugar.

# Neurology

[Find doctors](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/neurology/#finddoctors)

### Conquering Brain Health

Your brain is extraordinary—an intricate network of neurons that shapes who you are, how you feel, and how you perceive the world. Neurology is the branch of medicine that focuses on diagnosing and treating disorders of the nervous system, which includes the brain, spinal cord, and the vast network of nerves in the body. Our best neurologist in Dubai at HealthHub clinics, work tirelessly to unravel the complexities of neurological conditions, leveraging both cutting edge technology and compassionate care to offer you the best cures.

### What Does Neurology Cover?

Neurology is a vast field that manages a wide variety of conditions affecting the nervous system.

- Brain health conditions
- Disorders of the spine and nerves
- Neurodegenerative diseases
- Peripheral nerve disorders

### Common Signs You Should See a Neurologist

Not sure if you need to visit a neurologist? Here are some signs to look out for:

- Persistent headaches or migraines
- Unexplained numbness or tingling
- Memory loss or cognitive decline
- Seizures or convulsions
- Difficulty speaking or understanding language
- Sudden loss of coordination or balance
- Chronic dizziness or vertigo

If you notice any of these symptoms, then it is essential to seek medical attention promptly; moreover, consulting the best neurologist in Dubai at HealthHub Clinics can ensure timely diagnosis and effective treatment. Neurological issues are often manageable with early detection and appropriate care.




### The treatment that covers

### Headaches

Personalized treatment options, including immunological therapies

### Dizziness and Vertigo

Experts diagnosing and treating vertigo and related balance disorders

### Epilepsy

Comprehensive epilepsy care supported by an advanced EEG lab

### Pain syndromes

Fibromyalgia, neck, and back chronic pain management

### Neuropathies

Diagnostics and management of neuropathic conditions

### Stroke Evaluation

Precise evaluation and care for stroke patients

### Multiple Sclerosis and other Demyelinating disorders

Expert care for MS and related conditions

### Neuromuscular Disorders

Managing complex disorders like Myasthenia Gravis

### Parkinson's disease and Movement disorders

Personalized care and advanced treatment options

### Cognitive disorders

Memory issues, Alzheimer's disease, and other cognitive impairments

### Sleep disorders

Insomnia, restless legs syndrome, and sleep apnea care

### FAQ

What are the early signs of dementia?

Memory loss, confusion, difficulty with tasks, personality changes, and trouble with communication.

Is Alzheimer’s disease the same as dementia?

No, Alzheimer’s is a type of dementia; dementia is a general term for memory and cognitive decline.

What is benign paroxysmal positional vertigo (BPPV)?

BPPV is a condition where small crystals in the inner ear disrupt balance, causing brief episodes of dizziness when
changing head positions.

# Neurosurgery

[Find doctors](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/neurosurgery/#finddoctors)

Neurosurgery is a highly specialized medical field that diagnoses and treats disorders of the nervous system. This includes the brain, spine, and peripheral nerves. Whether you are searching for the best neurosurgeon in Dubai or simply want to learn about state-of-the-art surgical advances, the field ranges from addressing life-threatening conditions like brain tumors to improving quality of life through spinal surgeries. As a result, neurosurgery blends precision, innovation, and care.

### Compassionate Neurosurgical Care

At [HealthHub Clinics](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/clinic/), every patient is treated special. Our team of best neurosurgeon in Dubai, including spinal surgeons and brain surgeons, combines years of expertise with the latest medical advancements. Therefore, we create personalized treatment plans. These plans ensure safety, precision, and results.

### Your Partner in Restoring Hope

At HealthHub Clinics, neurosurgery is not just about treating conditions—it’s about rebuilding lives. We combine compassionate care with innovative techniques. Our team includes the best neurosurgeon in Dubai, helping you face each day with renewed confidence. ### FAQ

What is minimally invasive spine surgery?

Minimally invasive spine surgery (MISS) is an advanced surgical technique that uses small incisions, specialized instruments, and imaging guidance to treat spine conditions with less damage to surrounding muscles and tissues.

At Healthhub, minimally invasive spine surgery is used to treat conditions such as herniated discs, spinal stenosis, fractures, and degenerative spine disease.

Benefits include:
\- Smaller incisions
\- Less blood loss
\- Reduced post-operative pain
\- Shorter hospital stay
\- Faster recovery

When should you consult a Neurosurgeon?

Consider seeking advice from a neurosurgeon if you experience: Unusual or severe headaches/migraines, Weakness in your arms, legs, or face, Persistent sleep issues. Dizziness or balance problems. Memory lapses or forgetfulness,
Vision problems.

What is stem cell therapy for spinal conditions?

Stem cell therapy for the spine is a regenerative treatment that uses the patient’s own stem cells to promote healing of damaged spinal discs, joints, or soft tissues.

At Healthhub, stem cell therapy may be recommended for:
\- Degenerative disc disease
\- Chronic back pain
\- Early arthritis of the spine
\- Disc injuries

What is PRP treatment for spine problems?

Platelet-Rich Plasma (PRP) therapy is a regenerative treatment that uses concentrated platelets from the patient’s own blood to promote healing.
PRP spinal treatment may help with: Chronic back pain, Ligament injuries, Facet joint pain, and Mild disc degeneration

What is kyphoplasty and vertebroplasty?

Kyphoplasty and vertebroplasty are minimally invasive procedures used to treat spinal compression fractures, often caused by osteoporosis or trauma.

-Vertebroplasty: Medical cement is injected into the fractured vertebra to stabilize it.

\- Kyphoplasty: A balloon is first inserted to restore height before cement is injected.

These procedures can:
\- Relieve pain quickly
\- Restore spinal stability
\- Improve mobility

How do I know if I need spine surgery?

Spine surgery may be considered if:

\- Conservative treatments (medications, physiotherapy, injections) fail
\- Pain persists for several weeks or months
\- There is progressive weakness or numbness
\- There is loss of bladder or bowel control
\- Imaging confirms a surgically treatable condition

A specialist evaluation at Healthhub can determine the most appropriate treatment plan.

# Obstetrics & Gynaecology

[Find doctors](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/obstetrics-gynaecology/#finddoctors)

### Navigating Women’s Health with Compassion and Care

Obstetrics and Gynecology clinics in Dubai do more than provide medical treatment—they address the unique and evolving health needs of women at every stage of life. This field focuses on care that supports your physical, emotional, and mental well-being in a safe, inclusive, and compassionate environment.

At [HealthHub Clinics](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/clinic/), our team of leading gynecologists in Dubai, drawn from around the globe, combines advanced expertise with innovative treatments to ensure you receive the highest quality care at every milestone. We are dedicated to supporting you, every step of the way.

### Pregnancy and Childbirth

Pregnancy marks one of the most life-changing journeys you’ll experience. From the moment you discover you’re expecting, everything begins to transform. Our maternal care at HealthHub Clinics, one of the leading Gynecology Clinics in Dubai, ensures you and your baby stay healthy, informed, and supported throughout pregnancy and beyond. Trust our experienced gynecologists in Dubai to guide you through every trimester with expert advice and personalized care.

### Infertility Care & Support at Our Gynecology Clinic in Dubai

Infertility affects 1 in 8 couples, often making it an emotional and deeply personal challenge. At HealthHub, we stand by you with expert support and cutting edge fertility treatments. Our services include:

- Diagnostics & Testing
- Ovulation Induction
- Lifestyle Support Programs

### Menopause: A New Chapter

Menopause, a natural stage of life, can bring physical and emotional changes. Our holistic approach to menopause care ensures you receive personalized solutions for improved well-being and quality of life. Our specialized services include:

- Hormone Replacement Therapy (HRT)
- Non Hormonal Alternatives
- Bone & Cardiovascular Health Screenings

### Why Choose HealthHub?

Whether you’re exploring fertility treatments, seeking routine gynecological care, or navigating menopause, HealthHub Clinics brings together the best minds in women’s health. Our team of experienced obstetricians and gynecologists at our Gynecology Clinic in Dubai provides personalized, compassionate care, supported by state-of-the-art medical advancements to guide you through every stage of life.

### FAQ

How often should I visit a gynaecologist?

We recommend an annual visit for routine check-ups, even if you’re feeling perfectly healthy. Regular visits help detect
and manage any health concerns early.

What’s the best way to manage painful periods?

Many cases of painful periods can be eased with heat therapy, over-the-counter pain relievers, or hormonal birth control. If the pain continues, consult a gynecologist to rule out underlying conditions such as endometriosis or fibroids.

At what age does menopause usually start?

Most women experience menopause between the ages of 45–55. However, everyone’s experience is unique, so ongoing support from a trusted healthcare professional is essential.

What lifestyle changes should I make for healthy pregnancy?

Focus on maintaining a balanced diet, regular physical activity, stress management techniques, and avoid smoking.
These changes not only contribute to a healthier pregnancy but also improve long-term well-being.

text_content.title: Ophthalmology
text_content.clean_body:
# Ophthalmology

[Find doctors](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/ophthalmology/#finddoctors)

### A Clearer Vision for Life

Your eyes are one of your most vital organs. Yet many people neglect their care until discomfort or vision issues appear. If you are living in the UAE, consulting an Eye Specialist in Dubai can help protect your eye health. Hours of screen time, skipped checkups, and lifestyle habits put your eye health at risk. In addition, conditions like digital eye strain, myopia, and dry eyes are increasingly common. This makes proactive care essential.

At HealthHub Clinics, our Eye Specialist in Dubai provide expert care using advanced technology and a compassionate approach. Whether you’re treating a specific concern or maintaining overall eye health, our **eye doctors** are here to help you see life clearly.

### Why Eye Care Matters

Your eyesight plays a central role in daily life. However, aging, environmental stress, screen exposure, and underlying health issues can affect it. Proper eye care goes beyond clear vision—it also reveals your overall health. Diseases like diabetes and hypertension often show early signs in the eyes.

If you experience dryness, blurry vision, discomfort, or other unusual symptoms, it’s crucial to consult our **eye clinic near me**. You should also adopt habits to protect your vision long-term.

### Limit Screen Time for Better Vision

Screens are unavoidable in modern life, from computers and phones to TVs. Prolonged screen usage can lead to **digital eye strain** (computer vision syndrome), causing dry eyes, headaches, blurry vision, and neck discomfort. In these cases, our **eye doctors** at HealthHub Clinics provide guidance and treatment. As a result, you can reduce these symptoms and maintain eye health.

### Nutrient-Rich Diet for Healthy Eyes

Certain nutrients nourish and protect your eyes:

- **Vitamin A** (carrots, sweet potatoes): Prevents night blindness and maintains cornea health.
- **Omega-3 Fatty Acids** (salmon, walnuts): Reduces dry eye symptoms.
- **Lutein and Zeaxanthin** (leafy greens, eggs): Protect against age-related macular degeneration.
- **Vitamin C and E** (citrus fruits, almonds): Lowers the risk of cataracts.

At HealthHub Clinics, our **eye specialist in Dubai** combine expert care, advanced technology, and practical guidance to ensure lifelong vision health.

### FAQ

How often should I get my eyes checked?

Children and adults without serious vision concerns should have their eyes examined every 1-2 years. If you have a condition like diabetes or wear glasses/contact lenses, schedule yearly checkups or as advised.

What is blue light, and how does it affect my eyes?

Blue light, emitted by screens and artificial lighting, can lead to eye strain and disrupt your sleep. Using anti-blue light filters and taking regular screen breaks can reduce these effects.

Can you treat Myopia with LASIK?

Myopia can be corrected with glasses, contact lenses, or permanent solutions like LASIK surgery.

What is glaucoma?

Glaucoma is a condition where increased pressure in the eye damages the optic nerve, potentially causing vision loss.
Early detection is critical.

What causes eye floaters?

Floaters occur due to changes in the vitreous gel inside the eye. While usually harmless, they may sometimes indicat a more serious condition.

text_content.clean_body:
# Orthopaedics

[Find doctors](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/orthopaedics/#finddoctors)

### Move with Confidence at the Leading Orthopedic Clinics in Dubai

Living an active and fulfilling life shouldn’t be limited by joint pain, injuries, or mobility challenges. At HealthHub Clinics, our Orthopaedics Department helps everyone—from high performing athletes to the elderly—regain freedom of movement, recover from injuries, and improve their quality of life.

### What is Orthopaedics?

**Orthopaedics** is a specialized medical field focused on the prevention, diagnosis, treatment, and rehabilitation of conditions affecting the musculoskeletal system. This includes bones, joints, ligaments, muscles, and tendons—everything that keeps your body moving. At HealthHub, our expert orthopedic specialists provide expert care to restore mobility and function for all patients.

### Arthroscopic (Keyhole) Surgery for Sports Injuries

Minimally invasive [**arthroscopic surgery**](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/articles/post-operative-rehabilitation/) is a cornerstone of sports injury management. Using a small camera and specialized instruments, our orthopedic surgeons repair ligament tears, cartilage damage, and joint instability with minimal trauma to surrounding tissues. This approach enables faster recovery, reduced pain, and a quicker return to sports and daily activities. Our orthopedic specialists treat ACL tears, meniscus injuries, and shoulder dislocations, helping you keep your joints healthy

### Physiotherapy in Orthopaedic Recovery

**Physiotherapy** is essential in orthopedic recovery, advanced rehabilitation techniques with the expertise of skilled physiotherapists. Working closely with our orthopedic surgeons, the physio team restores mobility, enhances healing, and improves overall function. From post surgical rehabilitation to chronic musculoskeletal conditions, patients benefit from tailored treatments, including manual therapy, electrotherapy, and patient care plans.

### Who Benefits from Orthopaedic Care?

Orthopaedics is for anyone experiencing bone, joint, or muscle issues. You may benefit if you are:

- An athlete recovering from a sports related injury
- An elderly individual managing arthritis, osteoporosis, or other age related conditions
- A worker or student dealing with repetitive stress injuries
- Recovering from an accident, surgery, or severe fractures
- Experiencing joint pain or limited mobility affecting daily life

Consulting with an **orthopedic specialist** at our **orthopedic clinic in Dubai** can empower you to take charge of your health and regain your independence.




### The treatment that covers

### Joint replacement

Hip, shoulder or knee replacement

### Joint preservation

Maintaining or improving existing joint tissues

### Sports injuries

Shoulder, knee, hips and ankles injury care

### Minimally invasive spine procedures

Spine injections and spine endoscopy

### Trauma (Fracture) care

All bones trauma management

### Pain management

Injectable treatments for pain and inflammation management

### Pediatric Orthopaedics

Bone, joint, or muscle problems in a children

### Pediatric Neurological Rehabilitation

Therapeutic care for children with neurological conditions

### FAQ

Are orthopaedic surgeries safe?

Absolutely. Thanks to advancements in minimally invasive techniques and robotic-assisted technologies, modern orthopaedic surgeries are safer and more efficient. Recovery plans are customized to help patients resume their routines quickly and effectively.

When should I see an orthopaedic specialist?

You should consult a specialist if you experience chronic pain, restricted mobility, or injuries that haven’t healed with basic treatments. Early detection and intervention can prevent complications and improve long-term outcomes.

What lifestyle measures support bone health?

A diet rich in calcium and vitamin D, combined with weight-bearing exercises, can help maintain strong bones. Avoid smoking and excessive alcohol consumption, as they can weaken bone density.

Can physiotherapy aid in managing joint pain?

Yes! Physical therapy strengthens muscles, improves flexibility, and corrects movement patterns, which are essential
for preventing injuries and relieving joint pain during recovery.

# Paediatrics

[Find doctors](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/paediatrics/#finddoctors)

### Ensuring Lifelong Health for Your Child

As parents, nothing matters more than your child’s well-being. From their first steps to their teenage years, every stage brings questions, challenges, and decisions about their health. **Paediatric care** guides you through this journey. At HealthHub Clinics, our Specialist Pediatrician in Dubai provide expert advice and care to nurture your child’s growth, development, and overall health.

### What is Paediatrics?

**Paediatrics** is the branch of medicine that focuses on the care of infants, children, and adolescents—from birth up to age 18. Our **children specialist doctors** focus on your child’s physical, emotional, and social health, providing prevention, early detection, and treatment for illnesses and developmental concerns.

### What We Treat

Our **child specialists** manage a wide range of conditions, including:

- **Skeletal deformities** – bone alignment care
- **Dental services** – oral health solutions
- **Asthma** – breathing condition management
- **Rashes & allergies** – skin allergy relief
- **Bronchitis** – respiratory care support
- **Cold, flu & fever** – illness symptom relief
- **Abdominal pain & gastrointestinal issues** – digestive health care
- **ENT infections** – ear, nose, throat care
- **Urinary tract infections (UTI)** – treatment and prevention
- **Dehydration** – hydration support

### Why Regular Paediatric Visits Matter

Regular visits to a **children’s doctor** aren’t just for when your child is sick—they’re essential for preventative care. Here’s why:

- Monitoring Development: Our specialist paediatricians track milestones like speech, motor skills, and social growth.
- Preventative Care: Vaccinations and health screenings protect your child against preventable diseases.
- Behavioral Guidance: Paediatricians support sleep issues, eating challenges, and behavioral concerns.
- Building a Health History: Routine visits create a comprehensive medical record, helping detect issues early.

Paediatric care is about more than treating illnesses—it’s about building a strong foundation for lifelong health. For families seeking the Specialist Pediatrician in Dubai, HealthHub Clinics offers trusted, compassionate care from expert children’s doctors.




### The treatment that covers

### Well-Baby Care

Child wellness monitoring

### Child Development Assessment

Growth milestone evaluation

### Developmental Delay

Early intervention support

### Chronic Disease

Long-term care

### Comprehensive immunization program

Vaccine protection plan

### School Entrance Physical / Sports Physical Examination

Fitness Check

### FAQ

Are vaccinations safe for children?

Yes. Paediatricians follow immunization schedules set by medical authorities like the CDC to ensure safety and effectiveness in preventing serious diseases.

What should I look for in a paediatrician?

Look for a provider who listens, communicates clearly, and respects your parenting concerns. It’s also helpful to choose someone who is technologically integrated, for seamless healthcare experiences.

How often should my child visit the paediatrician?

Newborns should have frequent check-ups at birth and key milestones up to age two. From ages two to five, annual visits help monitor growth, development, and vaccinations. After five, yearly check-ups are recommended, with additional visits as needed for any health concerns.

How do I know if my child is meeting their developmental milestones?

Developmental milestones are general guidelines, and every child develops at their own pace. Regular paediatric check-ups help track your child’s growth. If you have concerns, consult our paediatrician for early assessment and guidance.

text_content.title: Pathology
text_content.clean_body:
# Pathology

[Find doctors](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/pathology-medical-speciality-services-in-dubai-healthhub-by-al-futtaim/#finddoctors)

Our Pathology Department offers advanced, comprehensive diagnostic testing to support the health of our community in Dubai. As a state-of-the-art pathology lab in Dubai, we combine cutting edge technology with expert staff to deliver _accurate, reliable, and timely lab results in Dubai_. Our mission is to provide peace of mind through high quality laboratory services that patients and doctors trust. Whether you need routine blood tests or specialized tissue analysis, our team is here to serve you with professional care and dedication.

### **Advanced Laboratory Technology**

We operate one of the most **advanced laboratories in Dubai**, equipped with the latest instruments and automated systems. Our facility features a fully automated robotic pre-analytical system that handles samples with precision and speed, reducing human error and expediting test processing. High throughput analyzers and digital monitoring ensure that every specimen is processed efficiently. This modern infrastructure allows us to deliver _timely lab results in Dubai_ without compromising quality. By investing in ongoing staff training and rigorous quality protocols, we ensure continuous improvement and consistent reliability in every test.

### **Comprehensive Testing Services**

Our pathology department covers all common areas of diagnostic testing. We offer a wide range of laboratory tests, including:

- **Hematology:** Complete blood count (CBC), anemia profiles, coagulation studies, and bone marrow evaluations to assess blood health.
- **Clinical Chemistry:** Metabolic panels, liver and kidney function tests, lipid profiles, electrolyte analysis, hormone levels, and vitamin assays for organ function monitoring.
- **Microbiology:** Bacterial and fungal cultures, antibiotic sensitivity tests, viral panels, and other infectious disease diagnostics.
- **Immunology & Serology:** Autoimmune disease panels, allergy testing, immunoglobulin and antibody assays to evaluate immune response.
- **Histopathology & Cytology:** Biopsy analysis, Pap smears, fine-needle aspirations (FNAC), and other tissue examinations to detect cancer, inflammation, and cellular abnormalities.
- **Molecular Diagnostics:** Genetic tests and molecular assays (PCR, DNA sequencing) for inherited conditions, infectious diseases, and oncology markers.
- **Blood Bank & Transfusion:** Safe blood typing, cross matching, and preparation of blood components under rigorous protocols.
- **Specialized Testing:** Endocrinology panels, toxicology screens, nutritional markers, and customized test packages for comprehensive health assessment.

Our extensive services support general health screenings as well as in-depth investigations for complex conditions. We collaborate closely with healthcare providers to ensure each test result contributes to a precise diagnosis and effective treatment plan.

### **Accredited Quality and Reliability**

Quality is paramount in our lab. We adhere to the highest industry standards and maintain international accreditation (recognized globally) to ensure **reliable testing in Dubai**. This accreditation reflects our commitment to accuracy, safety, and continuous improvement. Every test result undergoes strict quality control procedures at multiple stages, from sample collection to final analysis. Our senior specialists routinely participate in proficiency testing and peer review programs to guarantee the precision and reliability of every test.

### **Expert Pathologists and Staff**

Our team of DHA board certified pathologists and experienced laboratory professionals work hand-in-hand to deliver quality care. Our pathologists specialize in all major disciplines — including hematopathology, chemical pathology, microbiology, and anatomical pathology — to interpret complex test results. Laboratory technologists and technicians are trained in the latest procedures and handle each sample with meticulous attention. Together, they ensure that every test is processed correctly and accurately.

**Fast Turnaround Times**

We know timely results can be critical to patient care. Our streamlined processes and automated systems enable us to provide **timely lab results in Dubai** for routine tests, often within 24 hours or less. Urgent or STAT tests are prioritized immediately so physicians can make rapid treatment decisions. By optimizing workflows and using digital reporting systems, we reduce wait times and deliver reports quickly. Patients can access results securely online through our patient portal or receive them directly through their healthcare provider.

**Patient Convenience and Care**

At our clinic, patient experience is a top priority. Our modern laboratory offers a comfortable and efficient environment. Friendly staff guide you through the process. We provide flexible appointment scheduling, and in many cases, you can walk in for standard blood draws. Clear instructions are provided for any special tests requiring preparation, and multilingual support is available to assist our diverse community. We also ensure strict confidentiality and privacy for all lab results and personal health information.

### **Why Choose Our Pathology Lab?**

- **State-of-the-Art Facilities:** We operate an advanced laboratory in Dubai, featuring cutting edge technology and automation for the most sophisticated diagnostic testing.
- **International Accreditation:** We hold esteemed global accreditation and comply with international quality standards, ensuring reliable testing in Dubai that meets global benchmarks.
- **Expert Team:** Our skilled pathologists and lab professionals bring years of specialized experience to interpret results accurately and provide consultative insights.
- **Comprehensive Test Menu:** From routine health screenings to specialized diagnostics, our broad range of services covers all pathology needs under one roof.
- **Fast, Reliable Results:** We deliver _timely lab results in Dubai_ through efficient processes and continuous monitoring, allowing you and your doctor to act quickly on important health information.
- **Patient-Centered Service:** We prioritize your comfort and convenience with clear instructions, minimal wait times, and support throughout the testing process.

Whether performing a routine wellness checkup or a complex diagnostic investigation, our pathology team delivers excellence at every step.

Experience the difference of an advanced, patient focused pathology laboratory. **Contact us today** to schedule your test or learn more about our services. Our team is here to provide fast, accurate diagnostics that help you take charge of your health. Book your appointment now and receive the reliable testing and timely lab results in Dubai that you deserve.




### Pathology Doctors

No doctors found.



### FAQ

Are your lab results accurate and reliable?

Absolutely. Our laboratory follows strict quality control protocols and is internationally accredited, reflecting our dedication to accuracy. Experienced pathologists review and validate results, and we participate in continuous proficiency testing. Patients and doctors can trust the reliability of our test reports.

How quickly will I get my test results?

Timely lab results in Dubai are one of our key priorities. Most routine blood tests and common panels are completed within 24 hours, with some results available on the same day. Urgent tests are processed immediately, often giving physicians results within hours. You can access results securely through our online portal or receive them directly from your healthcare provider.

Do I need a doctor’s referral to use the lab?

It depends on the test and your health coverage. Many routine tests can be done with or without a doctor's order, but certain specialized tests require a physician referral. We recommend consulting your doctor or contacting our clinic, and our staff can guide you through the process. Walk-ins are welcome for basic screenings, though scheduling an appointment can often save time.

Is your lab accredited?

Yes, our pathology lab is internationally accredited and meets the highest quality standards. This accreditation (from a leading global organization) demonstrates our commitment to maintaining excellence in laboratory testing and patient safety. We regularly undergo rigorous external audits to ensure compliance.

How do I schedule a lab test or health check?

Scheduling is easy! You can book an appointment through our website or by calling our clinic. Many tests can be done as part of routine health check packages or with a physician’s order. We often offer same-day appointments and flexible hours to accommodate your needs.

Will my insurance cover the pathology tests?

Coverage depends on your insurance plan. We work with major providers in Dubai, and many of our services are covered. It’s best to check with your insurer about your specific coverage. Our billing team can also assist you with insurance claims and transparent pricing information.

### Clinics with Pathology

# Physiotherapy

[Find doctors](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/physiotherapy/#finddoctors)

### Expert Care and Rehabilitation by the Best Physiotherapist in Dubai

Our team of **physiotherapists at HealthHub Clinics** are experts in treating patients recovering from serious, long-term, or complex medical conditions and injuries. We provide specialist care and rehabilitation for patients with musculoskeletal or spinal cord injuries, offering both short-term and intermediate support. With a world-class multidisciplinary team and the latest high-tech equipment, we optimize and speed up recovery.

Our holistic approach, delivered by some of the **best physiotherapists in Dubai**, focuses not only on the immediate condition but also on long-term improvement. We aim to restore your quality of life through advanced vocational rehabilitation measures, [sports injuries](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/articles/sports-injury-rehab/) and personalized therapy programs. After a comprehensive assessment, our specialists work closely with patients and their families to set achievable goals and track progress throughout the recovery journey.




### The treatment that covers

### Musculoskeletal Injuries

Muscle, bone, and joint treatment

### Sports Injury Rehab

Recovery for athletes

### Post-Op Rehab

Strength recovery after surgery

### Myofascial Release

Relieves muscle tightness

### Kinesiotaping

Supports movement and healing

### Antenatal/Postnatal Exercises

Fitness for pregnancy and postpartum

### Shockwave Therapy

Improves walking ability

### Dry Cupping

Boosts circulation, reduces pain

### Dry Needling

Relieves muscle pain

### Electrotherapy

Ultrasound, laser, shockwave, and stimulation

text_content.title: Psychiatry
text_content.clean_body:
# Psychiatry

[Find doctors](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/psychiatry/#finddoctors)

Have you been experiencing persistent sadness, overwhelming anxiety, or drastic mood swings? These could be signs of a mental health condition that requires professional support and care.

#### **Comprehensive Mental Health Care, Best Psychiatrists** in Dubai

HealthHub Clinics connects you with the best psychiatrists in Dubai, easing your distress and ensuring that you receive compassionate, expert care from highly qualified mental health professionals. Our team focuses on thorough assessments and accurate diagnoses. We also provide personalized treatment for a wide range of psychiatric conditions affecting adults. With HealthHub’s Psychiatry department, you can trust that your mental well-being is in good hands. In addition, our dedicated mental health services combine advanced medical knowledge, evidence-based psychopharmacology (medication management), and a compassionate approach. This enables us to provide you with effective, individualized treatment plans for lasting wellness.

#### **What is Psychiatry and Why Is It Important?**

Psychiatry is the medical specialty devoted to the diagnosis, treatment, and prevention of mental health disorders. Psychiatrists are medical doctors who specialize in mental health – they can evaluate both the mind and the body, prescribe medications, and provide comprehensive care for conditions like [depression](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/articles/depression-treatment/), [anxiety](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/articles/anxiety-disorders/), bipolar disorder, and more. This field is vital because mental health is a cornerstone of overall health. When psychological issues are addressed properly, individuals can lead healthier, more fulfilling lives. At our **psychiatric clinic in Dubai**, we emphasize that seeking help is a sign of strength. Therefore, we are committed to helping patients overcome challenges through a combination of therapy guidance and medical treatment.




### The treatment that covers

### Depression

Persistent low mood

### Bipolar Mood Disorder

Mood swing stabilization

### Anxiety Disorders

Worry, panic, phobias

### OCD

Obsessions and compulsions

### PTSD

Trauma and flashbacks

### Stress & Adjustment

Life change support

### Psychotic Disorders

Hallucinations, delusions

### Women’s Mental Health

Hormonal mood disorders

### Sleep Disorders

Insomnia and sleep issues

### Somatoform Disorders

Mind-body symptoms

### Mood & Medical Conditions

Mental health with chronic illness

### Psychiatry Doctors

- HealthHub - Al Qusais 1 Doctor
- HealthHub - Arabian Center 1 Doctor
- HealthHub - Silicon Oasis 1 Doctor
- HealthHub Day Surgery - Festival City 1 Doctor

[Book Appointment](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/doctor/dr-yasir-malik/#bookingpanel) [more Details](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/doctor/dr-yasir-malik/)



### FAQ

What is the difference between a psychiatrist and a psychologist?

A psychiatrist is a medical doctor specializing in mental health, which means they can diagnose conditions and prescribe medications. A psychologist, on the other hand, typically has a doctoral degree in psychology (PhD or PsyD) and provides psychotherapy (talk therapy) and counseling but does not prescribe medication. Both professionals often work together – for example, you might see a psychologist for therapy while a psychiatrist manages your medication.

When should I consider seeing a psychiatrist?

You should consider seeing a psychiatrist if you are experiencing mental or emotional symptoms that are persistent, distressing, or affecting your daily life. For example, seek help if you have prolonged sadness, extreme mood swings, severe anxiety or panic attacks, thoughts of self-harm, or any other ongoing mental health concern. Early intervention is key – getting help sooner can lead to better outcomes. Even if you’re not sure, a consultation can provide clarity and relief.

Do I need a referral to see a psychiatrist at HealthHub?

No referral is needed. Adults seeking mental health care in Dubai can book an appointment directly with our psychiatric specialists. Simply call us or use our online system to schedule a visit at a time and location convenient for you.

Will my discussions and treatment be kept confidential?

Absolutely. Anything you share with your psychiatrist is private and protected. HealthHub Clinics follows strict privacy standards to ensure your personal information and medical records remain confidential. We want you to feel safe and secure when discussing sensitive issues.

Will I have to take medication if I see a psychiatrist?

Medication is one tool psychiatrists use, but you may not always need it – it depends on your specific situation. After evaluating you, the psychiatrist will discuss a recommended treatment plan. Sometimes therapy or lifestyle changes alone are enough; in other cases, medication can greatly help by relieving symptoms and correcting chemical imbalances. If medication is recommended, your doctor will explain why and how it works, and you will always have a say in the decision. Our goal is to choose the most effective, least invasive approach. You will never be forced to take medication – any prescription is made with your agreement and will be closely monitored for safety.

# Radiology

[Find doctors](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/radiology/#finddoctors)

#### **Expert Diagnostic Imaging & Patient Focused Care**

We combine cutting-edge technology with compassionate expertise to deliver fast, accurate, and safe diagnostic imaging. Our Radiology Center in Dubai Health Hub Clinic is led by experienced Radiologists. They are supported by highly skilled Sonographers and Radiographers. Together, they ensure every image tells a clear, reliable story about your health.

From X-rays and Ultrasounds to CT and MRI scans, we provide modern outpatient imaging in an environment designed around your comfort, safety, and convenience. At HealthHub Clinics, clarity leads to confidence. Confidence, in turn, leads to better care.

**Empowering Better Decisions Through Precision**

Radiology center in Dubai at Healthhub clinics in Dubai, we go beyond imaging — we provide insight. Expert analysis and advanced digital reporting support every scan. This helps your doctor make informed decisions faster. Our mission is to make diagnostics not just accurate but also accessible, efficient, and patient-focused. This ensures your health receives the care it truly deserves.

**Our Advanced Equipment**

We have invested in modern imaging systems to meet a full spectrum of diagnostic needs:

**Digital X-Ray & C-Arm Systems** – High-resolution imaging for skeletal, chest, abdominal and intraoperative procedures.

**Multi-Slice CT Scanner** – Rapid, high-definition scans for all body parts with 3D reconstruction and low-dose protocols.

**1.5 Tesla MRI** – Comfortable MRI scans with superior image clarity for complex soft-tissue and neurological conditions.

**Ultrasound & Color Doppler Systems** – State-of-the-art ultrasound units for routine and specialized diagnostic applications.




### The treatment that covers

### Cardiac MRI

For examining the heart and vessels to detect cardiovascular conditions.

### CT Scan

Used to create detailed images of bones, joints, muscles, and soft tissues to diagnose injuries, disorders, or diseases.

### General X Rays

For checking bones and joints for fractures, infections, or abnormalities.

### Ultrasound

For assessing blood flow, organs, and soft tissues, and monitoring pregnancy.

### FAQ

Do I need to make lifestyle changes before the scan?

No significant lifestyle changes are usually required. Simply follow any instructions we provide, such as avoiding food for a few hours in some contrast scans.

Is diagnostic imaging safe?

Yes, at HealthHub, your safety is our top priority. We use advanced imaging technology and follow strict safety standards to ensure minimal radiation exposure while delivering clear and accurate diagnostic results.

How much does the imaging cost?

Costs vary by scan type. We offer clear pricing when you book. Please contact our reception for specific scan fees and available outpatient packages.

How soon will I get my results?

Most reports are ready within 24-48 hours. If your doctor requests urgent review, we will expedite accordingly.

text_content.clean_body:
# Urology

[Find doctors](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/urology/#finddoctors)

Urology is a medical specialty that focuses on the health of the urinary tract and reproductive systems. If you are searching for a urology clinic in Dubai, you’ll find that HealthHub clinic in Dubai provide care for men—including the kidneys, ureters, bladder, urethra, and the reproductive organs like the prostate and testicles. For women, it focuses on the urinary system. In fact, this area often overlaps with gynecology.

Some conditions treated by urologists include:

> - [Urinary Tract Infections](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/articles/genitourinary-tract-infections-in-dubai/) (UTIs)
> - [Kidney Stones](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/articles/urinary-stones-in-kidney-ureter-and-bladder/)
> - Prostate Health Issues
> - Male Infertility
> - Overactive Bladder
> - [Pelvic Floor Disorders](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/articles/urogynaecology-in-dubai-pelvic-floor-care-at-healthhub-clinics/)
> - Bladder and Kidney Cancer

At HealthHub urology clinic in Dubai, our DHA board certified urologists use state-of-the-art technology to ensure effective and minimally invasive care for all your urological concerns.

What sets HealthHub apart is its team of leading urologist in Dubai. Our urologists are trained internationally and are some of the most reputable experts in the region.




### The treatment that covers

### Genitourinary tract infections

Urinary infection care

### Urinary stones in Kidney, Ureter & Bladder

Laser stone removal

### Benign Prostatic Hyperplasia

Prostate enlargement

### Prostate Cancer

Assessment and diagnosis

### Hematuria management

Testicle inflation management

### Over-Active Bladder

Bladder hyperactivity management

### Male Infertility

Diagnosis and management

### Urinary incontinence

Involuntary urination management

### Kidney and Bladder cancers

Assessment and diagnosis

### FAQ

Do women need Urologists too?

Yes! While urology is sometimes seen as a male-focused specialty, many conditions affect women's urinary health.
Urologists treat women for conditions like:
• Recurrent UTIs
• Overactive bladder or incontinence
• Pelvic organ prolapse
• Kidney stones

What foods should you avoid to prevent kidney stones?

If you're prone to kidney stones, it's essential to be mindful of certain foods that could increase your risk such as foods high in sodium, Cola beverages, fast foods and processed meats. black tea and chocolate, spinach, almonds,
cashews and soy products.

Why is Prostate Health Screening important?

For men, routine prostate exams are vital for detecting issues like enlarged prostate or prostate cancer early.
This may include blood tests like the Prostate-Specific Antigen (PSA) test or physical exams.
Who needs it? Prostate exams are recommended for men over 50 or younger if there's a family history of prostate cancer.

text_content.title: Vascular Surgery
text_content.clean_body:
# Vascular Surgery

[Find doctors](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/specialties/vascular-surgery/#finddoctors)

If you’re looking for a trusted vascular clinic in Dubai, HealthHub Clinics offers access to experienced vascular surgeons who specialize in diagnosing and treating conditions of the vascular system—including [varicose veins](https://www.healthhubalfuttaim.com/treatments/varicoseveins-treatment/), arteries, and the lymphatic system. These specialists manage vascular health throughout the body, excluding the brain and heart.

Your body cannot function if your blood isn’t flowing smoothly. Conditions such as hardening of the arteries can create “traffic jams” in your circulatory system. This may obstruct the flow of blood to any part of the body. Our vascular surgeons handle blocked carotid arteries in the neck. They also treat problems of the aorta (a large main artery), after it leaves the heart and enters the abdomen. A vascular surgeon also treats peripheral vascular disease, which often affects the arteries in the legs and feet.

Our surgeons perform both traditional open surgery and minimally invasive, image-guided procedures. These procedures include laser surgery for varicose veins. They also include clot retrieval using endovascular methods. In addition, they perform minimally invasive surgery for abdominal aneurysms or blockages caused by atherosclerosis that could threaten life or limb. Finally, peripheral arterial disease testing and stenting are done to prevent amputations.




### The treatment that covers

### Arterial Disease Treatment

Stent Grafts (Aneurysm Repair)
Thrombectomy
Catheter-Directed Thrombolysis

### Diabetic Foot Management

Angioplasty & Stenting
Thrombectomy
Catheter-Directed Thrombolysis

### Varicose Veins Treatment

Compression therapy
Sclerotherapy
Endovenous Laser Therapy (EVLT)
Radiofrequency Ablation

### Carotid Artery Disease Management

Carotid Endarterectomy
Carotid Artery Stenting

### Treatment for Lymphedema

Thrombectomy & Catheter-Directed Thrombolysis
